title: NetSuite Accountant
description:
Please apply ONLY if you have hands-on NETSUITE experience. This is a full-time role aligned with US working hours (flexible schedule).



Role Overview

The Accountant reports directly to the Financial Controller and is responsible for managing core accounting functions, including Accounts Receivable (AR), General Ledger (GL), and Accounts Payable (AP) along with cash management. This role ensures that financial records are accurate, processes run efficiently, and reporting timelines are consistently met. The position is heavily involved in the month-end close and overall financial reporting activities.



Acting as the Controller’s right hand and backup, this role helps maintain continuity across accounting operations.



Key Responsibilities



Accounts Receivable & Billing

• Lead end-to-end AR operations across a large and growing client base (900+ accounts)

• Own and manage the bi-weekly invoicing cycle within NetSuite

• Support and collaborate with the billing team on day-to-day activities

• Handle AR reconciliations, adjustments, credit memos, and issue resolution

• Assist with collections by preparing accurate reports and providing actionable insights

• Work with large datasets in Excel to validate billing data and reconcile balances

• Support initiatives to automate and improve billing workflows



General Ledger & Month-End Close

• Partner with the Financial Controller to execute and manage month-end close

• Prepare journal entries, accrals, reconciliations, and necessary adjustments

• Generate and review financial statements for accuracy and completeness

• Identify opportunities to accelerate the close process

• Ensure the integrity and accuracy of the general ledger



Accounts Payable & Cash Management

• Oversee AP processes, including vendor payments and workflow management

• Ensure proper expense classification and coding within the GL

• Monitor payment schedules, approvals, and disbursements; process or release payments via banking platforms

• Support payroll-related disbursements for virtual assistants

• Track cash positions and assist in maintaining rolling cash flow forecasts



Systems, Data & Process Improvements

• Utilize NetSuite and Excel extensively for daily operations

• Analyze and reconcile large volumes of financial data

• Identify inefficiencies and recommend process improvements

• Develop and maintain SOPs and internal controls



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting

• CPA is a plus

• 3–5 years of progressive accounting experience

• Strong experience with general ledger functions in a US accounting environment

• Background in high-volume accounts receivable operations

• Advanced Excel skills with experience handling large datasets



Skills & Competencies

• Hands-on NetSuite experience, especially in AR and data imports

• Advanced Excel proficiency (e.g., pivot tables, complex formulas)

• Highly reliable with strong sense of accountability

• Detail-oriented with a data-driven mindset

• Able to work independently with minimal supervision

• Experience collaborating with remote teams

• Strong written and verbal communication skills



What We Offer

• Paid holidays

• Paid time off (PTO)

• Remote setup



How to Apply

Please write a short cover letter and share a Google Drive link to your resume. Ensure the link is accessible to anyone with the link.

title: Senior Growth & Revenue Expert – Scaling Payments & Conversions
description:
I am looking for a senior growth and revenue expert who can significantly increase the number of successful payments and overall revenue of my business. The objective of this role is very clear: more conversions, more completed payments, and scalable growth.



This is not a general marketing role and not a position for juniors. I am only interested in working with experts who have already operated at a high level and who have experience with large or well-established companies. If you have not worked with serious businesses or high-volume environments, this role is not a fit.



The person I am looking for fully understands the complete flow of an online business: from traffic and first impression, to website structure, messaging, user behavior, checkout flow, and payment completion. You must be able to analyze my website and funnels in detail and clearly explain what needs to change to increase conversion rates and reduce drop-offs during the payment process.



I expect you to be able to look at my business objectively and say exactly where money is being lost, why users are not converting at maximum potential, and what concrete steps are required to fix this. This includes improvements in UX, CRO, funnels, and payment optimization. The focus is not theory, but real, measurable impact on revenue.



I want to work with someone who thinks strategically, communicates directly, and is focused on results. Someone who understands how scaling works at a professional level and who can contribute insights that actually move the business forward.



This role is intended for experts only. I am not interested in experiments, generic advice, or surface-level marketing tactics. I am looking for proven experience and clear value.



Social proof is required.

When applying, you must clearly show:

Companies or brands you have worked with (preferably well-known or high-revenue businesses)

Concrete results you have achieved (growth, conversion increases, revenue impact)

Any relevant case studies, portfolios, or references



Compensation will be aligned with expertise and results, and a long-term collaboration is possible for the right person.

If you are an experienced growth professional who knows how to increase payments, optimize conversion flows, and scale online businesses, you are invited to apply.

title: Experienced Webflow Developer Needed for High-End Course Platform
description:
I am looking for a highly professional Webflow developer to build a complete course platform for my business. I sell online courses and need a fully functional, modern learning platform built entirely in Webflow, using a premium template and a clean, high-end 2026-style design. The platform must look professional, trustworthy, and optimized for conversions.



The platform will host approximately eight courses, with all video content securely hosted on Vimeo and embedded into the course environment. Each customer must have their own account. After a one-time payment, the customer receives access to the purchased course for 21 days only. Once this access period expires, the course must automatically be removed from the user’s account, and the customer must purchase again to regain access. This is strictly a one-time payment model, not a subscription.



I am looking for someone who truly understands how to build a scalable and secure course platform in Webflow. You must not only build the platform, but also teach me how everything works after delivery, including where and how content is managed, how access is controlled, and how I can make changes independently in the future. A proper handover and clear explanation are mandatory.



I only want to work with developers who have already built course platforms before. If you have not built a real course platform in Webflow, this project is not a fit. If you have experience, you must provide examples of course platforms you have built. I want to see live websites or real projects that demonstrate your experience and quality of work.

If you are confident that you are the right person for this project, respond to this job post with your strategy, explain how you would structure the platform, and include links to previous course platforms you have built. Only experienced and professional Webflow developers should apply.

This site is misleading visitors and causing serious reputational damage. This is a clear case of impersonation and trademark infringement.



I am looking for someone with proven experience in handling scam and impersonation websites, who understands this process and can act quickly and effectively.



If you have experience with similar cases and can take immediate action, please explain how you would approach this and share examples of cases you have successfully resolved.

title: Payment Specialist (iDEAL & Bancontact)
description:
We are looking for an experienced payment specialist who can help us successfully set up and activate iDEAL and Bancontact for our business.

We run an online course website focused on theory exam preparation. We sell digital theory courses for exams such as car, motorcycle, and other driving-related theory exams. Payments are a critical part of our business, especially for the Dutch and Belgian markets, which is why iDEAL and Bancontact are essential for us.

We have already tried multiple providers, including Stripe and Mollie, and most parts are set up correctly. However, activating and keeping iDEAL and Bancontact fully operational has not been successful so far. We are therefore looking for someone who truly understands payment processors, acquirers, and onboarding requirements, and who knows how to get these payment methods approved and running without issues.

Your role is to help us secure a working payment processor that supports iDEAL and Bancontact for our specific use case. This includes guiding us through the correct setup, compliance, communication with PSPs or acquirers if needed, and making sure everything works smoothly for a course-based business.

If you are able to arrange this successfully for us, we are very open to a strong collaboration and are willing to offer a good financial reward for the result. This is a result-driven role: if you deliver, we pay well.

We are looking for someone professional, experienced, and reliable, who knows how payment systems work in practice, not just in theory.

If you believe you can help us solve this and get iDEAL and Bancontact live, we would like to hear from you.

title: Senior Full-Stack Laravel Developer (Online Course Platform)
description:
We are looking for a senior, professional full-stack Laravel developer to work on our online course platform. This is a serious project and we are not interested in junior developers or amateurs.

Our website is built in Laravel and serves paid online courses. Users purchase access, receive an account, and can access the course content for 21 days, after which access automatically expires and the user must purchase again. You must fully understand this type of access logic and be able to maintain and improve it without issues.

You will be responsible for maintaining and improving the existing codebase, integrating and maintaining payment systems, and ensuring that the checkout and payment flow work flawlessly at all times. You must be comfortable working with API integrations, especially payment APIs, and understand how to implement them securely and reliably.

In addition to backend work, you should also be able to handle the frontend at a high level. The platform must look modern, clean, and professional (2026-level design). We expect strong UX and UI skills, not basic layouts.

The website is in Dutch, so experience working with Dutch companies or Dutch-language platforms is a strong plus. Professional communication and a serious working attitude are required.

We work with FastPanel for server, so familiarity with FastPanel or similar control panels is expected.

Before starting any collaboration, signing an NDA is mandatory.

If you are a senior developer with real experience in Laravel-based platforms, online course or membership systems, payment integrations, and modern frontend design, and you are looking for a serious long-term project, we invite you to get in touch with your experience and relevant work.

description:
Virtual Assistant (AI-Driven Operations & Social Media)

You will be working closely with a team building AI-driven business infrastructure, content ecosystems, and automated growth systems for founders and service businesses.

title: Content Coordinator / Social Media VA (Repurpose + Schedule + Engage)
description:
About the role  

I write. You distribute.



I’m the voice of Best Business Brokers (B3) and Southern Fried Thoughts. I don’t need a ghostwriter. I need a sharp operator who can take my blog posts and turn them into platform-native content that gets seen.



What you’ll do daily/weekly:

- Turn each blog post into:

  - LinkedIn article + 2–3 LinkedIn posts  

  -
 post + graphic  

  - Instagram caption + hashtags  

  - X thread/post  

  - Short-form video script (Reels/TikTok) based on my talking points  

- Schedule content (Buffer/Hootsuite/Meta Business Suite—tell me your tool)  

- Basic Canva graphics (clean, simple, consistent)  

- Engage with comments/DMs in a brand-approved tone  

- Weekly report: what performed, what didn’t, what we should double down on  

- YouTube upload support for Deep Brain AI videos (titles, descriptions, tags)



You’re a fit if you:  

- Understand LinkedIn formatting and how to write for “scroll stopping”  

- Can keep a content calendar organized  

- Can match a casual, credible, inspiring brand voice without getting corny



To apply  

Send:

1) 2 examples of content you repurposed across platforms (before/after is ideal)  

2) What scheduling tools you’ve used  

3) Your weekly availability + rate  

4) Put REPURPOSE in the subject line

title: Full-Time Copywriter
description:
Job Title: Full-Time Copywriter

Location: Remote (based in the Philippines)

Working Hours: 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM China Time (lunch break 12:00 to 1:00 pm)

Company Registration: Hong Kong



Compensation and Benefits:

- Salary: 60,000 PHP per month

- 13th-month bonus

- 10 paid holidays per year

- 3 paid sick days per year

- 10 paid vacation days per year

- Overtime paid at 1.25× regular pay (OT may occasionally be required)



About P1peline:

P1peline is a service agency and SaaS platform focused on supporting custom product companies, primarily in the Australian market. We help businesses that sell customized products improve how they market, sell, and operate. Our work spans websites, branding, marketing, content, and digital systems.



We work across a range of industries and client types, including both B2B and B2C businesses. We are building a team that values clear thinking, strong execution, and high standards.



About the Role:

We are looking for a full-time copywriter who can write clear, useful, high-quality copy across different industries, audiences, and formats.



This role is not just about writing well. It is about understanding a business, identifying its real competitive advantages, and translating those into clear benefits for the target customer. You must be able to adapt your voice and tone based on the brand, audience, and purpose of the content.



You will work closely with web designers, graphic designers, and marketers to create copy for websites, blogs, marketing campaigns, and other business needs.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

- Writing website copy, landing pages, service pages, and other web content

- Writing blog posts and educational content

- Writing marketing copy for ads,
 campaigns, brochures, social posts, and other materials

- Adjusting tone and voice based on different brands and audiences

- Turning business features and competitive advantages into clear end-user benefits

- Writing for both B2B and B2C audiences

- Asking the right questions to understand a client’s positioning, offer, market, and goals

- Working with internal teams to make sure copy supports the design and marketing strategy

- Delivering concise, high-value copy, including in cases with limited word counts



What We’re Looking For:

- Strong ability to write in different voices and tones

- Strong understanding of how to communicate value clearly

- Ability to write for different industries and business types

- Experience writing web page content, blog posts, and marketing copy

- Strong communication skills

- Ability to ask smart, useful questions to gather the right information before writing

- Ability to write clearly without relying on fluff or vague language

- Strong attention to structure, clarity, and usefulness

- Ability to go deep on a topic and produce high-level content

- Ability to write strong B2B copy that prioritizes clarity and useful information over fancy language

- High quality standards and strong judgment

- Ability to meet deadlines consistently

- Ability to accept feedback and revise work when needed

- High attention to detail and self-quality checking before submission



Important Requirements:

- This is a full-time remote position

- Applicants must submit both a resume and a portfolio

- Applications without a portfolio will not be considered



What We Look For in Portfolios:

- When reviewing portfolios, we will be looking closely at:

- Clear structure and organization

- Writing that delivers useful information instead of empty fluff

- Strong understanding of audience and positioning

- Ability to explain topics clearly and at a high level

- Ability to write concise copy that still communicates real value

- Range across different tones, formats, and industries



How to Apply:

Please send your resume and portfolio. In your application, include examples that show your ability to write across different tones, industries, and formats, especially web copy and B2B content.

title: Technical Product Owner (WordPress + Scrum)
description:
**Must include a resume to apply. Applicants without a resume will be ignored. 



About the Role



The founder of P1peline currently acts as the Product Owner for two Scrum teams and is transitioning out of the day-to-day backlog management responsibilities.



The Technical Product Owner will work closely with the founder to translate product ideas, instructions, and documents from him into structured backlog items that the teams can execute.



The founder defines vision and priorities. Your role is to convert those ideas into epics, features, and user stories with clear acceptance criteria so developers can work efficiently. 



The primary purpose of this job is to save the founder time on writing the actual user stories and to allow more time to be spent clarifying each user story, prioritizing the backlog, and preparing user stories for future sprints. 



Over time, a strong performer in this role will almost certainly be trained and promoted into a full Product Owner position with greater strategic responsibilities and a significant pay raise. 



This role supports two teams:



1. App Development Team - Building the P1peline platform (currently based on WordPress with advanced plugins and integrations).

2. Service Team - Delivering websites and digital systems for clients and partner companies.



Key Responsibilities



1. Backlog Management

- Translate founder vision and instructions into user stories (often epics and features will be provided by founder) 

- Maintain, organize, and prioritize the backlog for two teams

- Refine user stories with clear context, acceptance criteria, and constraints



2. Sprint Preparation

- Work with Scrum Masters to prepare work before sprint planning

- Break down larger ideas into smaller tasks

- Help prioritize backlog items when needed



3. Ongoing Support

- Clarify requirements when developers and scrum master have questions

- Gather feedback from founders and stakeholders on progress 



Required Qualifications



- Strong experience working with WordPress development projects as designer, developer, or project manager 

- Experience working within Scrum / Agile teams and passion for Agile

- Experience writing user stories and acceptance criteria

- Comfortable communicating with founders, scrum masters, and developers

- Strong written English and attention to detail



Preferred Experience



- Experience in a Product Owner or Scrum Master role for app, web, or custom service teams

- Scrum certifications such as PSM or CSM

- Experience working with busy managers or founders and translating vision into action

- Experience with complex WordPress setups (plugins, integrations, automation)



User Story Examples:

- 

- 



This role is a good fit if you:

- Want to build a long-term career as a Product Owner

- Enjoy working in a startup environment where things move quickly

- Like collaborating closely with developers, Scrum Masters, and founders

- Are excited about working with a young, ambitious team primarily based in the Philippines

- Enjoy learning new systems, tools, and technical concepts

- Are interested in the technical side of product development, especially WordPress-based systems

- Are passionate about Scrum and Agile workflows

- Like taking large amounts of information and turning it into clear, structured user stories

 -Enjoy improving and optimizing backlog items so developers can execute efficiently



This role is not a good fit if you:

- Need constant direction or supervision to complete tasks

- Do not have experience with WordPress development environments or Scrum

- Struggle with written communication or documenting requirements clearly

- Are not detail-oriented

- Do not enjoy structuring and refining user stories

- Have difficulty taking high-level ideas and extracting the core requirements and priorities

- Prefer slow-moving or highly structured corporate environments rather than startups



Tools & Software Used by the Team

- Asana

- WordPress

- Elementor

- Crocoblock plugins

- Advanced Custom Fields (ACF)

- Figma

- 

- Glide Apps

- Microsoft Teams

- Google Docs

- ChatGPT

*Expertise in all these tools isn’t required, but familiarity with them or a similar tool is preferred 



Company: P1peline

Job Title: Technical Product Owner (WordPress + Scrum)

Start Date: ASAP

Location: Remote (Based in Philippines)

Working Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (China Time) / 12:00 PM – 1:00 PM lunch break



Compensation & Benefits



- PHP 60,000 per month (paid bi-weekly)

- 13th month pay

- 10 paid holidays

- 10 paid vacation days

- 3 paid sick days



About the Company



P1peline is a HK registered company founded by an American and Australian living in China with a team based primarily in the Philippines. We are building a platform and service ecosystem for companies that sell custom products such as apparel, merchandise, teamwear, and promotional items.



Our goal is to become the operational partner for these businesses by helping them manage manufacturing, product development, digital infrastructure, and order management.



The company operates using Scrum with two-week sprints and works closely with partner companies including a sourcing agency and manufacturing factory.



We currently have a team of 15 and have weekly team building and skillshare time. We are passionate about collaboration and growth.

 your application to:

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
About Rural Energy

Rural Energy is a fast-growing, 100% locally-owned New Zealand energy solutions company specializing in solar installations for the agriculture sector. We're transforming how NZ dairy farms achieve cost savings through innovative solar-as-a-service solutions with zero upfront capital.



Why join us: We're a small startup with real growth opportunities. You'll wear multiple hats, gain exposure to all business areas, and have clear pathways to advancement as we scale.



The Role: Customer Success Specialist

You'll be the critical link between Rural Energy and our farming clients. Operating as both a trusted advisor and relationship manager, you'll handle everything from post-sale customer communication to installation support and lead generation.

Key Responsibilities



Customer Communication & Onboarding



Serve as the main point of contact for customers (via
, SMS, calls)

Guide farmers through the complete customer journey: contracting ? power changeover ? installation ? billing

Ensure customers are fully informed about timelines and processes

Maintain accurate records of all customer interactions and contracts



Sales Support



Ensure 100% contracting accuracy with zero errors

Reduce cancellation and churn rates through proactive engagement

Support the sales team with documentation and follow-up



Installation Coordination



Work with installation teams to meet farmer timeframe expectations

Collect and respond to installation feedback

Continuously identify improvements to the customer onboarding process



Relationship Building



Become a trusted, engaged member of the dairy farming community

Foster long-term relationships with customers

Contribute to the company's positive Net Promoter Score (NPS)





What You'll Need

Essential Requirements



3+ years proven experience in: customer service, account management, or sales

Strong communication skills: Clear writing 
s), phone calls, relationship-building

Attention to detail: Accuracy in documentation, reading comprehension, following processes

Problem-solving ability: De-escalate issues and take ownership of solutions

Self-motivation & initiative: Work independently in a remote team environment

Reliability: Consistent communication, punctual, dependable

Willing to work early from 4am - 12pm.



Ideal Bonus Skills



Solar, renewable energy, or electricity industry experience (understanding of products/installations)

Agricultural/farming sector exposure (familiarity with farming operations and mindset)

(English fluency is essential)





What We're Looking For (Personal Attributes)

A positive mindset and willingness to learn fast

Passion for building strong, authentic relationships

Someone who takes pride in delivering exceptional customer experiences

A team player who communicates openly and raises issues constructively

High initiative and ownership mentality



Position Details

Hours are at 4am - 12pm Philippines time (9am -5pm NZT)

Salary:

$21,120 NZD Annually

Php 670,200 Annually



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

You'll be measured on:



100% contracting accuracy — zero errors in sales documentation

Reduced cancellation/churn rates — proactive customer retention

5+ qualified leads per week — through referrals and relationship building

100% installation delivery on farmer timeframe — installation coordination

Positive installation feedback — customer satisfaction scores

Continuous process improvement — identifying gaps and solutions

Positive company NPS — contributing to overall brand reputation

Accurate record-keeping — clean, complete customer data





Why You Should Apply



Growth opportunity in a startup - Exposure to all business functions, real impact on company direction

Industry with purpose - Help farmers go green while saving money (75% conversion rate speaks for itself)

Remote flexibility - Work from anywhere in the Philippines

Competitive salary 

Leadership potential - Build the customer success function from the ground up

Real relationships - Work with an engaged agricultural community, not faceless transactions



You can also apply via
:



: 

Subject Line: "Customer Success Application - [Your Name]"

Please include:



Your CV/Resume (with dates and specific experience)



Your most relevant customer service/sales achievement

Your familiarity with solar, energy, or agriculture (if any)



Timeline: Applications reviewed on a rolling basis. Interviews scheduled immediately.



Quick FAQs

Do I need solar experience?

No, but it's a huge plus. We can train the product; we can't train work ethic and relationship skills.

Will I work with farmers directly?

Yes - you're the main point of contact via
, SMS, and phone. This requires genuine interest in agriculture and farming communities.

Is this fully remote?

Yes. You'll communicate with our NZ-based team and farmers entirely remotely.



Rural Energy is an equal-opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment.

This is NOT a basic VA role. You will be expected to take ownership, coordinate multiple stakeholders, and help build simple systems to make everything run smoothly.



The goal is simple: make our lives run efficiently without requiring constant involvement.



?

?



What We’re Looking For



Must-have:

 • Excellent written English

 • Ability to manage multiple priorities

 • Reliable and consistent



Very Important:

Tools:

Google Workspace, Notion, WhatsApp, Booking platforms



Very strong bonus: Italian language skills



?

?

???? How would you organize a busy family with multiple properties in different countries?

 3. (Optional but preferred) Include a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself

title: HubSpot CRM Expert
description:
Property Webmasters is on the hunt for a talented HubSpot CRM Expert to join our dynamic team and assit our marketing efforts. If you're ready to dive deep into workflows, automation, and data-driven strategies and you have an eye for future development, we want to hear from you!



About Property Webmasters

Property Webmasters is a leading provider of cutting-edge web solutions for the real estate industry. We empower businesses to thrive online through exceptional design, robust functionality, and strategic digital marketing. As we continue to grow, our commitment to leveraging technology for maximum impact becomes even more critical.



The Opportunity

This is more than just a job; it's a chance to be a pivotal player in our ongoing success. You'll work closely with our Head of Marketing, taking the lead on implementing and optimizing HubSpot CRM workflows and automations. Your expertise will be crucial in streamlining our processes, enhancing customer journeys, and ultimately contributing to our ambitious growth targets. We're not just looking for someone to maintain what we have; we're looking for someone who can help us build what's next.



What You'll Bring to the Table (Required Skills):

HubSpot CRM: You're a HubSpot expert. You have a deep understanding of its capabilities, including sales, marketing and service hubs.



Workflow & Automation: Proven experience designing, implementing and optimising complex workflows and automated sequences within HubSpot. You know how to make HubSpot work smarter, not harder.



Data-Driven Mindset: You're comfortable with data, analytics, and reporting within HubSpot, using insights to inform your strategies and demonstrate ROI.



Strong Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to translate technical concepts into clear, actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.



Problem-Solving: You're a natural problem-solver, able to troubleshoot issues and find creative solutions within the HubSpot ecosystem.



What We're Looking For in Future-Proofing Potential (Desirable & Developable Skills):

We're passionate about growth, both for our business and our people. While the above skills are essential, we're particularly keen to find someone with the following attributes and potential:



Integration Savvy: Experience with, or a strong interest in, integrating HubSpot with other third-party tools and platforms (e.g., Zapier, payment gateways, specific real estate software).



APIs: A foundational understanding of APIs or a keen interest in learning how to leverage them for advanced HubSpot customization and data exchange.



Analytical: Beyond standard reporting, you have an interest in advanced analytics, segmentation, and predictive modeling to identify new opportunities within our CRM data.



Project Management: The ability to manage multiple projects concurrently, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Proactive & Innovative Thinker: You don't just follow instructions; you proactively identify areas for improvement, suggest new strategies, and are excited about exploring emerging HubSpot features and best practices.



Learning Agility: A demonstrated willingness and ability to quickly learn new technologies, methodologies, and adapt to evolving business needs.



Why Join Property Webmasters?

Impactful Work: Your contributions will directly influence our marketing effectiveness and overall business growth.



Collaborative Environment: Work alongside a supportive and talented team who are passionate about what they do.



Professional Growth: We invest in our employees. You'll have opportunities to develop new skills, attend industry events, and advance your career.



Competitive Salary & Benefits: We offer a competitive remuneration package commensurate with experience.



If you're a HubSpot CRM expert ready to make a significant impact and grow with a forward-thinking company, we encourage you to apply!

title: Ecommerce Executive (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN ECOMMERCE



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Serve as the Point-in-Charge (PIC) and technical expert for the BigSeller platform, providing system guidance, troubleshooting, and workflow optimization.

- Stay updated on BigSeller feature releases and system enhancements, implementing updates to improve operational efficiency.

- Manage product listings across multiple online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Track and analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management, translating complex metrics into clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and provide ad-hoc support for campaigns and special projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–3 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.

title: B2B Cold Caller To Set Appointments
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



IMPORTANT: We are only looking for someone with specifically B2B cold calling experience. If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or leads from an ad, please do not apply.



---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- ----------



Hi — my name is Jordan, and I’m the founder of a company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist. We help service businesses capture missed calls and turn them into real customers instead of losing them to competitors.



We are not a large corporate call center where employees are treated like numbers. We are looking for 1–2 experienced B2B cold callers who want a long-term role with the opportunity to make good money and grow with our business.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

• Source B2B leads (leads are not provided)

• Make outbound cold calls

• Introduce our service in a clear and simple way

• Book qualified prospects for a free consultation

• Confirm that the appointments you book actually show up

• You do not close the deals, our team handles the sales calls. Your job is to start conversations and book quality appointments.



THIS ROLE IS A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

• Have real B2B cold calling experience

• Speak clear, confident English

• Have reliable internet and a quiet workspace

• Are comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

• Are consistent, disciplined, and reliable



COMPENSATION:

• $5 per hour base pay

• $25 for every attended appointment (show-up)

• $100 for every deal that closes

• Monthly performance bonuses available



HOURS:

• Part-time (20 hours per week) to start with the option to transition to full time

• Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:

• Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

• Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B

• Include the following 4 things in your application:

- 1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B

- 2) Describe in detail your experience: What service/product were you offering and to who

- 3) How did you find your leads?

- 4) Put "Dial And Smile" in the subject line.

title: Digital Media Video Editor
description:
The Role

We’re looking for a social media video editor to edit high volumes of UGC and AIGC and other SM first contents for app marketing campaigns across multiple client accounts. You’ll work with raw content and transform it into platform-optimized social media ads. This is a high-volume content production role with quick turnaround times that works closely with our in house creative strategist serving diverse clients and portfolios



What You’ll Edit

- UGC video content for social media ads (TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube Shorts, etc.)

- AI-generated video content (from Sora, Veo, Runway, and other AI tools)

- Multiple video variations per campaign

Required Tools

Must Have:



CapCut or Adobe Premiere Pro - Primary editing tools





Strong Advantage:



Adobe After Effects - Motion graphics and effects

Video Editing:



2+ years video editing experience

Deep understanding of social media platforms and what performs well

, YouTube Shorts

Understanding of SM content style and aesthetics

Technical:

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple client projects

- Ability to adapt editing style to different brands and client needs

- Quick learner who can work with new AI tools and formats

title: Senior Telesales Manager
description:
About VOLT

VOLT Co., Ltd. is a leading provider of solar solutions for residential, SME, and commercial clients. Our mission is to drive sustainable energy adoption while offering innovative financing options, making solar power accessible to all. 



Position Overview

VOLT is looking for a results-driven Telesales Manager (Philippines) with strong outbound B2C call center experience. This role is responsible for driving high-volume sales activity, improving conversion rates, and leading a small but ambitious team to hit aggressive growth targets.



Why Work With VOLT

- Join a young and fast-growing, high-performance team shaping SEA’s energy market

- High ownership, direct impact, and exposure to strategic growth initiatives

- Competitive salary, performance-based bonuses, health insurance, 10 days annual leave



Key Responsibilities

- Manage and optimize daily outbound telesales performance and KPIs

- Lead, coach, and push a small sales team to exceed aggressive revenue targets

- Improve sales scripts, objection handling, and closing techniques

- Monitor pipeline health, CRM discipline, and conversion metrics

- Coordinate closely with Marketing and Operations to ensure smooth execution



Key Requirements

- 4–6 years of experience in high-volume outbound telesales (B2C), ideally in insurance, telco, credit cards, personal loans, or similar call center environments

- First experience leading or mentoring a small team preferred

- Proven track record of consistently hitting and exceeding sales or commission targets

- Strong performance mindset, resilience, and ambition to grow into senior leadership

- Analytical, hands-on, and comfortable in a fast-paced, high-growth environment

title: Senior Conversion-Focused Web Designer Needed
description:
We are looking for a senior-level web designer who can build and design a modern 2026-ready online course platform. This is not for a junior or someone who only makes “nice looking” websites. We need a true expert who understands design, user psychology, and conversion at a high level.



The project involves designing the full experience of an online education platform: the public-facing website, high-converting sales pages, the user profile area, student dashboard, and the admin interface. Everything must feel premium, clean, modern, and strategically structured. The design should not only look strong, but guide the user naturally toward taking action and completing payment.



You must deeply understand customer flow. From the 
nt a visitor lands on the homepage until they purchase and access their course, every step must be intentional. Layout, spacing, typography, hierarchy, call-to-actions, and user journey must be optimized for clarity and conversion. The interface should remove friction, build trust instantly, and create 
ntum toward buying.



We only want to work with experienced professionals who have worked on serious projects before. If you have built high-level SaaS platforms, course platforms, or high-converting e-commerce funnels, we want to see it. Show us your portfolio and real case studies. Social proof is required.



If you understand how design directly increases revenue, improves retention, and strengthens brand positioning, then you are the type of expert we are looking for.

title: IT Helpdesk - L2 Support ( Work-From-Home)
description:
Company Overview: 

This is a privately owned IT and telecommunications firm based in South Australia that provides managed services and business-grade connectivity. The company supports small and medium-sized enterprises by offering network infrastructure setup, high-speed internet and fibre solutions, unified communications, cybersecurity services, and ongoing IT support and consultancy. Their approach focuses on delivering tailored, proactive solutions—positioning themselves as a dedicated technology partner that helps businesses operate securely, efficiently, and with long-term scalability in mind. 



IT Helpdesk - L1/L2 Support  Role Overview:

We are seeking a skilled and customer-focused IT Helpdesk - L2 Support professional to provide technical assistance, troubleshoot IT issues, and support end-users with hardware, software, and network-related queries. This role requires strong problem-solving abilities, excellent communication skills, and a proactive approach to IT support. 

Key Responsibilities 

? Level 1 Support (L1): 

o Serve as the first point of contact for end-user technical issues via phone,
, and ticketing system. 

o Diagnose and resolve basic IT issues related to hardware, software, network, and user accounts. 

o Assist with password resets,
 configurations, and access management. 

o Escalate unresolved issues to Level 2 support when necessary. 



? Level 2 Support (L2): 

o Investigate and resolve escalated technical issues, including system performance, security i
, and software/hardware failures. 

o Support Microsoft 365 administration, Active Directory, endpoint security, and cloud-based services. 

o Troubleshoot network connectivity, VPN, and VoIP/telephony issues. 

o Assist with system upgrades, patch management, and IT 

documentation.

Required Skills & Experience 

? Technical Proficiency: 

o Experience with Windows and macOS operating systems. 

o Knowledge of Microsoft 365, Active Directory, and cloud-based applications. 

o Familiarity with networking concepts (DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewalls, etc.). o Understanding of IT security best practices. 

? Soft Skills: 

o Strong communication and customer service skills. 

o Ability to troubleshoot and solve IT issues efficiently. 

o Team player with a proactive and solution-oriented mindset. 

Preferred Qualifications 

? Certifications such as CompTIA A+, ITIL, Microsoft 365 Fundamentals, or equivalent. 

? Experience with ITSM/ticketing systems like Zendesk, ServiceNow, or ConnectWise. 

? Knowledge of remote desktop tools and basic scripting (PowerShell, Bash).



Kindly fill up the form to proceed with your application:

title: Video editor - REELS/TIKTOK videos
description:
Video Editor for Reels & TikTok (Scaling Edge Agency)



Position: Video Editor (Reels/TikTok)

Location: Remote



About Us



Scaling Edge is a fast-growing growth consultancy that helps businesses scale through AI systems, paid advertising, and content strategy. We work with high-performing entrepreneurs, consultants, and service-based brands to help them grow faster and smarter through automation, branding, and data-driven marketing.



We’re looking for a talented Video Editor who can produce engaging, high-quality short-form videos (Reels and TikToks) for our clients. This role is ideal for someone creative, fast, and detail-oriented who understands how to make content stand out online.



What You’ll Be Doing



Editing short-form videos (30–60 seconds) for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



Managing large video batches (30–40 videos at a time) with a 48–72 hour turnaround.



Adapting your editing style to match different client brands and tones.



Incorporating trending sounds, captions, transitions, and storytelling techniques.



Collaborating with our creative and marketing team to ensure consistency and quality.



What We’re Looking For



Proven experience editing Reels, TikTok videos, or similar short-form content.



Strong proficiency with video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, or equivalent).



Excellent sense of pacing, music selection, and attention to visual detail.



Ability to meet deadlines consistently while maintaining high-quality standards.



Knowledge of current social media trends and content best practices.



(Experience with AI tools, marketing, or business-related content is a plus but not required.)



Why Join Scaling Edge



Work with a dynamic and creative team helping brands grow with AI and modern marketing.



Remote flexibility — work from anywhere with consistent, ongoing projects.



Opportunity to showcase your creativity and work with multiple brands across different industries.





Application Instructions



Please include:



A short introduction about your experience.



Examples or a portfolio of Reels/TikTok videos you’ve edited.



Your average turnaround time and preferred rate per video.



We look forward to collaborating with talented editors who can bring ideas to life and create content that captures attention.

title: Professional video editor/ social media manager
description:
JSK Advisory is a fast-growing marketing and automation agency helping professional service firms, eCommerce brands, and local service businesses scale using modern marketing systems. We are a startup but growing fast and are looking for an experienced and proactive person to join our social media and creative editing team. This is a fantastic opportunity to work with national brands across ecommerce and professional services and the right person will have long term career development opportunites. We're also based in Sydney Australia with only a 3 hour timezone difference from the Philippines, allowing you to work daytime hours (no graveyard shift!).



This role is focused on creating high-quality short-form content and ad creatives for
 and Instagram across our agency account, eCommerce brand and professional service clients. You will edit raw footage and voiceovers into polished videos, develop strong hooks for organic and paid content, add captions, on-screen text, graphics, and transitions, and ensure consistent visual quality and branding across all accounts. You will be fully managing the organic social media for our ecommerce brand 
 and tasked with growing views and engagement.



You will also assist with
 advertising by uploading ad creatives into
 Ads Manager, organising creative variations, and working closely with the founder to refine hooks, angles, and creative concepts for testing and performance.



Copywriting is an important part of this role. You will write clear, professional social media captions with strong hooks and calls to action, create visually engaging and scroll-stopping posts, and use AI tools such as ChatGPT to support ideation, repurposing, and content refinement. You will apply storytelling and direct-response principles appropriate for professional services and eCommerce audiences.



You will also be responsible for creating professional lead magnets including PDFs, guides, checklists, and short reports. The content will be produced and provided to you and you will design visually appealing layouts in PDF form. You will ensure all lead magnets are on-brand, visually polished, and optimised for lead conversion.



To be considered for this role, you must have at least three years of experience in video editing, graphics design and social media management creation. Experience working with professional service firms and eCommerce brands is a bonus. You should be proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing creative work across multiple brands.



As JSK Advisory continues to grow, this role offers clear long-term career pathways into
 Ads management and senior creative or account management positions. Salary is $500-$750pm based on experience and skills.



To apply, please provide your cover letter, resume and Words Per Minute typing speed (
/student/tests). Also include a one-minute video introducing yourself, outlining your experience, and explaining why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Full-time Entry Virtual Associate (VA) Positions. Philippines time zone. 260311
description:
This is an entry-level role, where the majority of knowledge and skills will be acquired through on-the-job training, paving the way for advancement to senior positions.



Are you seeking a full-time, long-term career that offers exceptional growth potential through advancement opportunities, along with a stable income and bonus incentives? Join our team if you have a keen eye for detail, an unwavering drive for productivity, and a strong sense of responsibility. If you possess self-motivation, assertiveness, and a strong work ethic, coupled with a positive outlook and the ability to excel in a fast-paced work environment, we invite you to reach out to us.



You will receive training and support for your work. Candidates without experience but willing to learn and grow are welcome.

This is for candidates who are keen to develop a professional career that allows you to work remotely and independently. There are career paths with promising future opportunities that have traditionally been accessible only through conventional means. However, our embrace of technology, good jobs are no longer restricted to traditional ways.



About Us

The business has collaborated with a highly acclaimed loan brokerage and independent financial advisory firm, along with several other partners, all of which are fully licensed by government authorities. We offer a diversified suite of financial services and solutions with a personalized approach.



With these partners, we have one of the largest, most-respected, and fastest-growing networks of advisers in the country. We provide sound and comprehensive financial advice at both individual and corporate levels.



Requirement

• Strong verbal and written English skills with a neutral accent.

• Knowledge of Chinese/Mandarin, whether verbal or written, is a significant advantage.

• Exceptional talent for natural conversation.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

• Owns a competent Windows computer/laptop and android mobile phone for work

• A dependable and consistent internet connection

• Consistent and reliable power supply without frequent outages.

• A distraction-free and quiet workspace.

• Utilizing a headset equipped with Noise Cancellation technology.

• Takes initiative and works independently to address challenges, consistently seeking solutions.



Other Matters

We will be communicating via various communication tools. There will be a probation period for one to three months, depending on your qualifications and experience, which is negotiable. Upon the completion of your probation period, you will become eligible for a 13th-month bonus, paid time off, and a range of employee benefits, including PhilHealth and the Social Security System. The annual performance bonus is determined by your key performance indicators (KPIs). You will follow the time zone of the Philippines. Among colleagues, your working hours may be arranged in rotation, including weekdays and weekends. A total work week of 40 hours. Your further potential salary growth will be based on your performance, which may be increased during the quarterly review.



Loan Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Engage with incoming leads primarily through WhatsApp on our business phone.

• Create comprehensive reports that incorporate inputs and details provided by clients.

• Create concise summaries and propose options for clients, utilizing templates for efficiency.

• Collaborate with the designated bankers to facilitate the processing of loan applications

• Schedule meetings with clients and bankers.

• Reach out to current clients as they approach the end of their loan lock-in period.

• Oversee client relationships and enhance processes through multiple CRM platforms.



Insurance and Investment Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Prepare the required documentation for the client's application, available in various systems.

• Reach out to clients through WhatsApp using our business phone, primarily to provide reminders and follow-ups.

• Utilize WhatsApp (business phone) as the main channel to engage clients and schedule appointments effectively.

• Craft client proposals utilizing the provided templates.

• Helping clients with insurance claims

• Contact insurers to obtain quotes and provide recommendations to clients.

• Oversee client relationships and streamline processes through a range of CRM systems.



Candidates who have shown capability and knowledge may be groomed towards senior roles or management roles.



Application

To apply for the job:

Please log in and click the link below to apply, and please follow the instructions.



There will be an assessment and a Microsoft Teams interview video call required, if you are shortlisted.

title: Full-Time Video Editor — James Jani Style YouTube Documentaries (NBA Content)
description:
NBA Insider (
) is a YouTube channel producing long-form NBA documentary-style video essays. We are hiring a full-time video editor to join us long-term with consistent, ongoing work.



=== THE STYLE WE'RE AFTER ===



Our #1 reference is James Jani: 

Watch any of his videos before applying. That is the quality and style we are going for.



Additional style references:

- Vox: 

- Johnny Harris: 



In short: cinematic, documentary-grade video essays with strong pacing, heavy motion graphics, and narrative tension. Think Netflix-level sports documentaries adapted for YouTube.



If you watch a James Jani video and think "I can edit like that" -- keep reading.



=== WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING ===



- Editing documentary-style NBA video essays (minimum 15 minutes per video) from voiceover, research docs, and creative briefs

- Sourcing all visuals yourself: archival NBA footage, game highlights, press photos, Getty Images, high-quality images, and any relevant media using fair use principles

- Creating motion graphics, animated text, kinetic typography, data visualizations, lower thirds, and transitions (this is a MAJOR part of the role -- not optional)

- Color grading and sound design to broadcast/cinematic standard

- Pacing and structuring edits to maintain narrative tension and viewer retention throughout the full video

- Working directly with the channel owner on creative direction for each video



Note: We do NOT provide raw footage. Your job is to source all visuals (B-roll, archival clips, images, photos) from the internet using fair use. You should be experienced in finding and curating high-quality visual material for documentary-style content.



=== MOTION GRAPHICS REQUIREMENT ===



This is non-negotiable. You MUST be highly skilled in After Effects (or equivalent motion graphics software). You need to be comfortable building from scratch: custom animations, kinetic text, data-driven visuals, dynamic transitions, and animated infographics. If motion graphics is not your strength, this role is not for you.



=== WHAT WE PROVIDE ===



- Artlist Max subscription (music, SFX, stock footage)

- Epidemic Sound subscription

- Voiceover audio for each video

- Research materials and scripts

- Clear creative briefs with references for each video

- Long-term, consistent work (we publish regularly)



=== REQUIRED SKILLS ===



- Expert-level video editing (Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve)

- Strong motion graphics and animation (After Effects or equivalent) -- NON-NEGOTIABLE

- Ability to source high-quality visuals, archival footage, and images independently using fair use

- Color grading and sound design

- Pacing and storytelling instinct (you know how to build tension and hold attention for 15+ minutes)

- Reliable high-speed internet connection and a capable editing workstation (you will be handling large project files)

- Strong English communication (written)



=== NICE TO HAVE ===



- Thumbnail design

- 3D motion graphics

- DaVinci Resolve proficiency

- Experience editing sports or documentary content

- Behance, personal website, or Vimeo profile with your work



=== COMPENSATION ===



25,500 PHP per video (equivalent to $600 CAD / $440 USD per video)



Payment is per completed video, paid promptly upon delivery. The more videos you complete, the more you earn. If your work is strong and consistent, there is no shortage of projects -- we publish regularly and are growing.



This is a long-term position with steady, ongoing work -- not a one-off gig.



=== TURNAROUND ===



Maximum 10 days per completed video. Ideal turnaround is 7 days. This includes weekends -- we operate on a delivery-based schedule, not a 9-to-5.



=== HOW TO APPLY ===



To be considered, you MUST include ALL of the following in your application. Incomplete applications will be ignored.



1. A link to your portfolio, showreel, Behance, Vimeo, or personal website -- specifically any documentary-style, James Jani-style, or motion graphics work you have done

2. Your best 60-second edit or reel that demonstrates your motion graphics and pacing ability

3. A short message (2-3 sentences): what editing software do you use, and what do you think makes James Jani's editing style effective?

4. Your expected rate per video in PHP



Applications without a portfolio link will NOT be reviewed.



=== WHAT HAPPENS AFTER YOU APPLY ===



Step 1: We review your portfolio and reel

Step 2: If your work matches what we are looking for, we will reach out to discuss the role

Step 3: Our top 2-3 candidates will be asked to complete a short PAID test edit (paid at a reduced rate) before final hiring



=== FAQ (READ BEFORE APPLYING) ===



Q: Is this a one-time project?

A: No. This is a long-term, full-time role with consistent work. The more videos you deliver, the more you earn.



Q: Do you provide raw footage?

A: No. You are responsible for sourcing all visuals (archival footage, game clips, photos, images) using fair use. We provide voiceover, scripts, research, and creative briefs.



Q: What software should I use?

A: Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve for editing. After Effects (or equivalent) for motion graphics.



Q: How will I receive project files?

A: We will share voiceover, scripts, and briefs via Google Drive.



Q: How will I get paid?

A: Via Payoneer, PayPal, or Wise -- whichever you prefer. Paid per video upon delivery.



Q: What is the expected turnaround per video?

A: Maximum 10 days per video. Ideal is 7 days.



Q: Do I need to be available during specific hours?

A: No fixed hours. We care about quality and meeting deadlines. That said, you should be responsive on messaging during reasonable hours for communication.



Q: How long are the videos?

A: Minimum 15 minutes. Most videos will be 15-25 minutes.

title: Cold Calling Representative Real Estate
description:
Part-Time Cold Calling Sales Rep / Real Estate (Land)



3-Month Contract | 20 hrs/week | Opportunity to Extend



We’re not looking for average — we’re looking for someone who thrives on outperforming targets and turning discipline into results.



At our company, we operate by three core values: Relentless Excellence, Disciplined Results, and Continuous Innovation. These aren’t just words — they guide how we work every day.



This role is focused primarily on cold calling landowners, identifying selling opportunities, and qualifying motivated sellers to keep our acquisition pipeline strong. If you’re competitive, organized, and enjoy conversations that lead to deals, this role could be a strong fit.



This is a part-time contract role for 3 months with the opportunity to extend based on performance.



Please follow the application process



Do NOT call,
, or DM about this role

beb2407d1ef59b12



APPLICATION LINK: b.link/ColdCalling



Company: 



Position Details:



- Pay: $10/hour + weekly performance bonuses

- Schedule: Monday – Thursday

- Hours: 2:00 PM – 7:00 PM (20 hours per week) EASTERN TIME ZONE

- Contract: 3-month contract with opportunity to extend

- Payment: Weekly (Mondays via 
)

- Start Date: ASAP



Role Responsibilities:



Cold Calling (Primary Focus)

- Call landowners to identify selling interest

- Build rapport and gather property details

- Qualify motivated sellers and identify potential deals



Lead Qualification

- Identify motivated sellers

- Segment prospects and move qualified opportunities forward



CRM & Reporting

- Log conversations and update records in the CRM

- Share notes and insights with the acquisitions team

title: Creative Strategist for DTC Brands / Dropshipping
description:
We’re Hiring a Creative Strategist (DTC / Dropshipping)



Flexible Schedule • Performance-Driven • Fast-Moving Creative Team



Hey Creative legends,



We’re an ambitious DTC e-commerce brand scaling aggressively across the UK and Germany. We’ve built past 8 figures without a dedicated Creative Strategist—but with Meta’s Andromeda update reshaping the game, it’s finally time to bring in someone who can own our creative direction.



If you know how to turn attention into conversions, break down angles and hooks, and build ads that actually perform, this role is for you.



This is not just a brief-writing job.

This is a strategic role that drives the entire direction of our creative output—concepts, scripts, research, testing, iteration, insights. If you love storytelling, performance ads, UGC structure, and analyzing what truly works, you’ll thrive here.



What You’ll Do



-Own creative strategy across UK & Germany

-Research hooks, angles, and trends using Meta Ads Library, TikTok, YouTube, and competitor analysis

-Build creative concepts and iterate based on real Meta performance data

- Master VSL copywriting, hooks, and story-driven ad frameworks

-Write clear, actionable creative briefs for editors, designers, and UGC creators

-Manage the creative testing pipeline:

Brainstorm ? Produce ? Test ? Analyze ? Iterate

-Lead and collaborate with a team of video editors

-Work closely with the Media Buyer to analyze CTR, CPC, CPA, CVR, and ROAS

-Use AI tools to speed up research, ideation, scripting, and testing

-Stay ahead of Meta trends (especially post-Andromeda)

-Organize creatives by angle, format, and funnel stage inside Notion / Google Drive



You’re a Great Fit If You:



-Have 2+ years in creative strategy, performance marketing, or DTC/dropshipping

-Understand direct-response psychology and why people click + buy

-Can explain why an ad works—and where the hook or angle comes from

-Are skilled in concept ideation, copywriting, and scripting

-Can manage creative teams and ensure fast, high-quality output

-Thrive in fast-paced, test-heavy environments with multiple product cycles

-Communicate clearly and professionally in English



Weekly Deliverables



-Creative briefs

-Hook & angle research

-VSL scripts

-Creative analysis with next-step recommendations

-Rapid testing and iteration (quality matters, but speed matters too)



???? Salary & Benefits



-$1,500 USD/month

-Performance bonuses tied to creative results

-Long-term role with strong growth potential

-Flexible working hours

title: Sales Operations Assistant (Solar Appointment Setter)
description:
About Us

Perth Solar Force is a dedicated provider of sustainable energy across Western Australia. From Geraldton to Margaret River and everywhere in between, we empower homeowners and businesses to take control of their power.  We aren't just selling solar, batteries and EV Chargers; we’re building a greener future and helping homeowners save thousands on their energy bills.



Are you a proactive communicator who thrives in a fast-paced, target-driven environment? We are looking for a dedicated Sales Operations Assistant to join our team and help manage our growing operations across Perth, Geraldton, and the Southwest. In this role, we treat our leads like gold. You will be the engine room of our sales process, ensuring no opportunity is missed and every customer receives a premium experience.

 

The Role: High Volume & High Impact

This is a target-driven, KPI-based role that requires high energy and exceptional multitasking. Your daily mission will include:

Lead Management: Proactively managing inbound leads from the 
nt, they arrive until an appointment is booked. You’ll be their main point of contact via call, SMS, and
.

- High-Volume Outreach: You will be aiming to reach a minimum of 100 calls per day, alongside SMS and
 follow-ups.

- Appointment Setting: You will work toward a set daily goal of booked appointments for our regional consultants.

- Calendar Mastery: Managing complex schedules across three regions, verifying travel times for our consultants, and ensuring the right reps are in the right places.

- Inbox & Phone Management: Serving as the frontline for our regional inboxes and phones, ensuring all communications are handled within the same working day.

- Documentation & Reporting: Maintaining meticulous records of all customer interactions in our CRM and providing daily reports to management.

 

What We’re Looking For

- Experience: Previous experience in sales or customer service. If you’ve pitched or sold products before, we want to hear from you!

- Tech Savvy: Proficiency in Gmail/Outlook and Google Sheets/Excel. Experience with CRMs (Zoho, Salesforce, or Simpro) and soft-phone systems (Zoom) is a major plus.

- Solar Knowledge: Knowledge of solar power is a bonus, but a willingness to learn is essential.

- Pressure-Ready: You are someone who remains calm under pressure and is confident making quick, independent decisions when needed.

- Communication Pro: You possess clear, professional communication skills, especially when liaising with customers, managers, and consultants.



Working Hours & Flexibility

- Standard Hours: Minimum of 6 hours per day, Monday to Friday.

- Break Policy: Please note that the 6-hour requirement does not include lunch breaks.

- Flexibility: We require a candidate who can be flexible and work longer hours when required (e.g. providing cover for other staff or managing high lead volumes). 



Requirements

As this is a remote position, you will need:

- A reliable, high-speed internet connection (with a backup internet available)

- A laptop/computer setup with at least one extra screen.

- A current version of Microsoft Office (mainly only need Outlook, for multiple
 access)

- The ability to invoice for your time (experience with Wise is preferred).

 

Compensation & Benefits

We believe in rewarding hard work and consistency:

- Daily Pay Rate: A reliable base rate for your time and expertise.

- Generous Commissions: Earn extra for every lead you book that is quoted.

- Weekly Payments: Get paid every week via Wise.

- Paid Time Off: You will receive paid Australian Public Holidays.

 

Why Join Us?

We value transparency, accountability, and a "can-do" attitude. We aren't just looking for a worker; we’re looking for someone who takes pride in their work, owns their mistakes, and constantly looks for ways to improve our processes.

 

Are you ready to hit the ground running? If you have the drive to make 100+ calls a day and the organisational skills to manage a multi-region calendar, we want to hear from you.

title: Head of Retention
description:
Apply here: 



Head of Retention



We are a multi-brand DTC incubator operating across the US, Asia, and Europe. We build, acquire, and scale consumer brands in beauty, wellness, health, lifestyle and personal care, with several brands already at 8-9 figures in annual revenue.



We are looking for a data-driven, aggressive, and highly "hands-on" Head of Retention to own the post-purchase experience and scale our subscription ecosystem to the next level.



THE ROLE



As the Head of Retention, you will be the "owner" of the customer lifecycle. Your primary mission is to bridge the gap between subscription data and marketing execution, reduce churn, and maximize LTV across their portfolio. You won’t just manage; you will "figure it out," vet their agencies, and optimize the technical integrations between their tech stack components.



This is a fully remote position.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

-Develop and implement comprehensive retention strategies to boost customer loyalty and lifetime value.

-Own the Loop Subscriptions platform, including technical integration with Klaviyo and managing the developer brief process for custom executions.

-Act as the primary point of contact and quality control for
, SMS, and post-purchase agencies (e.g., Simply).

-Deep dive into cohort projections and customer behavior data to identify engagement trends and opportunities.

-Manage and optimize
 marketing campaigns, including advanced segmentation, personalization, and rigorous A/B testing.

-Build and launch a brand-new loyalty and referral program from the ground up.

-Collaborate with the Head of Performance, Head of Creative, and Head of Operations to ensure a cohesive customer experience.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

-You have handled retention for brands at the 8-figure or 9-figure scale and know how to manage volume without breaking systems.

-Expert-level knowledge of Shopify, Klaviyo, Loop, and SMS platforms. Familiarity with Checkout Champ is a significant bonus.

-You don’t wait for a brief. You are aggressive, willing to test (and break) things, and take full accountability for churn and MRR volume.

-Ability to talk to developers and bridge the gap between marketing ideas and technical execution.

-We value experience from either background, provided you have had real "hands-on" responsibility.



WHATS IN IT FOR YOU

-You could be part of a company that is scaling rapidly ($6M to $10M MRR projection in a single month).

-You will have the budget and authority to build an in-house retention team (designers, strategists) if you can prove the need.

-They are a remote-first team that values results over specific working hours.



WHAT TO EXPECT FROM THE RECRUITMENT PROCESS



Apply to our form: 

Technical Assessment: An online test to demonstrate your retention expertise and how you approach retention strategy. 

Final Interview: An interview with the head of marketing.

 inbox
