title: Executive Assistant / Project Manager
description:
We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Team Admin / Executive Assistant / Project Manager to support leadership and keep the team operating smoothly.



This role is for someone who thinks in systems, spots gaps before they become problems, stays ahead of deadlines, and keeps the entire team aligned without needing constant supervision. You are here to support leadership, manage projects, and keep systems running smoothly so the rest of the team can focus on execution.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems, high standards, and real impact, not just managing tasks for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning scattered ideas into structured plans with clear owners and deadlines? Are you the type who follows up before being asked and catches details others miss? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting processes properly, and keeping teams aligned without constant supervision?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Admin & Team Support

- Manage calendars, meetings, follow-ups, and reminders

- Handle inbox organization and message triage

- Prepare documents, trackers, and internal updates

- Keep files, folders, and naming systems clean and consistent



Project Management

- Track ongoing projects, deadlines, and dependencies

- Break down tasks and assign owners

- Follow up on deliverables and flag risks early

- Keep project boards and trackers up to date (e.g. Notion, Monday, ClickUp, Sheets)



Systems & Process

- Build and improve simple systems that reduce back-and-forth

- Document SOPs and workflows as things evolve

- Spot inefficiencies and automation opportunities, and suggest, design, and implement improvements

- Maintain dashboards, trackers, and recurring reports



Communication & Coordination

- Act as the bridge between leadership and the team

- Clarify priorities and next steps after meetings

- Ensure instructions are understood and executed correctly

- Keep everyone aligned without micromanaging



REQUIREMENTS:

Experience & Capability

- Must have extensive experience as an executive assistant, chief of staff, or operations associate

- Project management experience and comfortable managing and driving multiple large projects

- Must have previous experience managing people. You may not have any direct reports, but the experience is important

- Must have experience automating workflows and designing workflow processes with automation in mind. You may not be individually responsible for building them, but you should already have the experience to handle basic tasks and understand how the process works

- Comfortable with outcome and goal-based delegation and does not need to be told individual tasks

- Experience with Google Suite and GoHighLevel CRM is a plus, but not required

- Should be fluent in AI, but not reliant on it to think for you



Work Style & Standards

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Excellent organizational skills

- Excellent time management skills

- Strong written communication

- Strong written and spoken English communication skills; near-native level preferred

- Comfortable juggling multiple priorities

- Must love creating, refining, and working with standard operating processes (SOPs)

- Proactive. You don’t wait to be told something is broken, you anticipate it before it breaks

- Must move with a sense of speed and urgency in everything



Ownership & Mindset

- Extremely growth-oriented and hungry to learn

- You are the type of person who follows through every single time, no matter what, and always gets the job done. No excuses, no matter what pops up

- You are the type of person who is delighted when the client or the person you're preparing something for is delighted

- You want meaningful work around people who are incredibly smart, hard-working, and dedicated, with a phenomenal culture. We work hard, but we have fun doing it together



Availability & Technical Requirements

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION IS REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Must be willing to work long hours and be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (not necessarily working 12 hours a day, but reliably reachable and able to respond quickly if something urgent comes up)



Preferred:

- Experience working as a process engineer, manufacturing engineer, or industrial engineer is preferred, but not required

- Experience designing team workflows, augmenting existing workflows with automation, and/or automating existing workflows is a strong bonus, but not required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.





STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project, estimated to be 2-3 hours of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Team Admin / Assistant / Project Manager with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Accounts Payable Assistant (WFH – Philippines)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Accounts Payable Assistant based in the Philippines to join our Finance team. 

This is a stable, long-term role working with colleagues across multiple countries in a supportive and experienced finance team. 

 

About Us 

MACVAD is an established international sourcing and distribution company with over 60 years of success. We are specialist sourcing and supply agents working across seven countries, supplying major retailers around the world. 

Our success comes from carefully managed growth and strong long-term relationships with both suppliers and customers. Our Finance team works closely with colleagues across different locations and is known for building strong and reliable relationships internally and externally. 

You will be joining a supportive team with solid systems and processes, where accuracy, accountability and teamwork are highly valued. 

 

The Role 

This role focuses on end-to-end Accounts Payable processing, ensuring supplier invoices and payments are processed accurately and supported by the correct documentation. 

Because MACVAD operates internationally, this role also involves working with multiple currencies, different tax jurisdictions, and intercompany transactions. 

 

Key Responsibilities 

* Processing supplier invoices and managing the Accounts Payable workflow 

* Managing invoice authorisation processes and ensuring correct approvals 

* Preparing and processing supplier payments 

* Performing supplier reconciliations 

* Processing company credit card transactions 

* Managing intercompany invoices and reconciliations between different group entities 

* Handling multi-currency supplier invoices and exchange rate differences 

* Reviewing supplier invoices to ensure correct VAT / GST treatment 

* Supporting colleagues with transactional finance queries 

* Maintaining accurate documentation and records 

Trading & Shipping Document Review 

A key part of this role involves reviewing documentation to ensure invoices should be paid. 

This includes checking and matching: 

* Purchase Orders 

* Bills of Lading 

* Packing Lists 

* Commercial Invoices 

The goal is to ensure the accuracy of supplier invoices and confirm that payment terms and shipping documentation align before payments are processed. 

 

About You 

You are someone who enjoys working with numbers and takes pride in producing accurate work. You are organised, efficient and naturally attentive to detail. 

You also understand the importance of strong supplier relationships and provide excellent customer service when dealing with queries. 

 

Requirements 

* Minimum 5 years accounting experience 

* Strong end-to-end Accounts Payable experience 

* Experience processing supplier invoices, reconciliations and payments 

* Experience working with multi-currency transactions and exchange rates 

* Experience handling intercompany transactions 

* Understanding of VAT / GST treatment on supplier invoices 

* High attention to detail and accuracy 

* Strong organisational and follow-up skills 

* Excellent written communication 

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment 

* Reliable internet connection 

 

Systems Experience 

Experience with Microsoft Dynamics / Business Central would be an advantage. 

However, candidates with experience using other ERP systems such as SAP, NetSuite, Sage, AX or Xero are also encouraged to apply. 

 

Advantageous Experience 

* Experience working in trading, sourcing, logistics or supply businesses 

* Familiarity with shipping documentation 

* German language skills 

 

Personal Qualities 

We are looking for someone who: 

* Has a positive and easy-going working style 

* Enjoys supporting colleagues 

* Has a “can do” attitude 

* Is dependable and takes ownership of their work 

* Is comfortable working in an international team environment 

 

Why Join MACVAD? 

* Established international company with strong client relationships 

* Supportive and experienced finance team 

* Exposure to international business operations 

* Stable long-term role with opportunities to grow 

 

How to Apply 

If this role sounds like a good fit for you, please apply and please include a link to your CV answer the following questions when applying: 

1. How many years of Accounts Payable experience do you have? Please briefly describe the AP tasks you handled. 

2. Have you processed invoices in multiple currencies or handled exchange rate differences? Please explain your experience. 

3. Have you worked with intercompany transactions or reconciliations between different entities? 

4. What accounting or ERP systems have you used in your previous roles? 

5. Do you have experience reviewing shipping or trading documents (e.g., Purchase Orders, Bills of Lading, Packing Lists, Commercial Invoices)? 

6. What is your expected monthly salary (in PHP)? 

7. Please provide a link to your CV or resume.

    Help build and launch high-converting creatives (images, copy, and short videos).

    Focus on low-ticket offers: driving cost-effective traffic, sign-ups, and subscriptions.

    Bring your own ideas to the table—we love data-driven tea
mbers who suggest improvements!



What We’re Looking For:

    Comfortable putting together ad creatives, not just managing the dashboards.

    A proactive mindset and readiness to transition to full-time after a successful 2-4 week paid trial.

    Based in the Philippines with strong English communication skills.



How to Apply:

We want to see your real-world experience, but we’ll keep it simple for now! Please reply with:

    A link to your portfolio OR 1-2 quick examples of campaigns you are proud of (just the highlights/results—we can dive into the dashboard details during the interview!).

    Please include the word "Growth" at the top of your application so we know you read this.

title: SHOPIFY Senior Full Stack Engineer – Luxury eCommerce
description:
Full Stack Web Developer (AI-Powered eCommerce – Luxury Brand)



Location: Remote / Hybrid

Employment Type: Optional based on Candidate



About the Opportunity



We are building a new, world-class luxury eCommerce website for a hyper-scale global fashion brand — and we’re looking for a highly creative Full Stack Web Developer to help build the new theme and create operational automations for customer service and inventory management. 



This is not a maintenance role. This is a build-from-the-ground-up opportunity.



You will collaborate with a global team of designers, product leaders, and engineers to craft a refined, high-performance digital flagship that reflects the sophistication of a luxury brand while integrating modern AI capabilities.



If you combine exceptional design sensitivity with strong frontend and backend engineering skills, this role is for you.



We are hiring a highly creative Full Stack Web Developer to help power the next generation of luxury eCommerce experiences for a hyper-scale global fashion brand.



This ongoing role sits at the intersection of premium digital experience, web development and AI innovation, and intelligent automation. You’ll help craft seamless, high-performance online journeys that reflect the elegance of a luxury brand while leveraging advanced AI technologies to create business solutions.



If you are passionate about building and website and refined, scalable, AI-enhanced eCommerce systems — this role is built for you.



What You’ll Build



High-performance luxury eCommerce storefronts

AI-powered personalization and product discovery experiences

Intelligent automation across merchandising, operations, and marketing

Seamless checkout and payment integrations

Scalable backend systems supporting global traffic

API-driven integrations with ERP, CRM, and logistics systems



Key Responsibilities



Collaborate closely with product, UX, and creative teams to build a brand-new global website

Translate high-fidelity luxury designs into pixel-perfect, responsive experiences

Architect scalable frontend and backend systems from the ground up

Contribute to technical architecture decisions and platform selection



Exceptional Frontend Development

Develop refined, high-performance UI using modern frameworks (React, Next.js, or similar)

Ensure flawless responsiveness across mobile, tablet, and desktop

Implement smooth animations, transitions, and premium micro-interactions

Maintain strict attention to visual detail, typography, and performance



Robust Backend Engineering

Design and develop secure, scalable backend services (Node.js, Python, or equivalent)

Build APIs to support product catalog, checkout, customer accounts, and integrations

Integrate payment gateways, CMS, ERP, CRM, and third-party systems

Optimize performance for high global traffic volumes



What We’re Looking For



Core eCommerce Expertise

Exceptional Attention to Detail and Proven Design Skills

Experience building or scaling eCommerce platforms

Strong understanding of conversion optimization and UX for luxury consumers

Familiarity with headless commerce architecture

Payment gateway integrations and order management systems



Technical Skills - Be the Best with Web Development and Design!



React / Next.js / Vue (or similar)

Node.js, Python, or equivalent backend framework

REST or GraphQL APIs

SQL & NoSQL databases

Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)

AI & Automation (Preferred)

Experience integrating APIs from platforms like OpenAI

Exposure to automation tools such as Zapier

Curiosity about AI-driven personalization and smart commerce experiences



What Makes You Stand Out



Experience with luxury or premium retail brands

Knowledge of global eCommerce scaling challenges

Experience with AI-driven customer journey optimization

Strong product sense and attention to design detail

Ability to balance innovation with brand sophistication

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field — and/or equivalent industry experience.



What Success Looks Like



Global Luxury Website Design in a Hyper Growth Phase

Seamless luxury digital experiences with exceptional performance

Launching a visually stunning, high-performance luxury eCommerce website

Elevated digital experiences that reflect premium brand standards

Automated workflows that reduce operational friction

Scalable systems capable of handling global demand spikes

Launching a visually stunning, high-performance luxury eCommerce website

Seamless collaboration across global teams

Clean, scalable codebase supporting future growth

Elevated digital experiences that reflect premium brand standards



What We Offer



Local Hours and Fabulous Team Culture

Competitive salary + performance incentives

Exposure to a global, high-performing team

Ownership of high-impact, visible features

Creative freedom to experiment with AI-driven innovation

Opportunity to shape the digital future of a high growth luxury brand

title: Social Content & Creative Execution Specialist
description:
???? About the Company



We are a fast-growing men’s skincare brand focused on building an elevated, high-quality, and authentic brand.



We care deeply about:

 • How the brand feels

 • Long-term trust with customers

 • Clean, premium aesthetics

 • Performance-driven content (not fluff)



We move fast, test constantly, and prioritize quality over noise.







???? The Role



We are hiring a Social Content & Creative Execution Specialist to take ownership of content production and execution.



Your role is simple:



???? Take ideas ? turn them into high-quality content ? fast



You will work closely with the team to execute content across Instagram and ad creatives.



This is an execution-focused role, not strategy.







???? What You’ll Be Responsible For

 • Turning approved ideas into finished content assets

 • Creating Instagram content (carousels, statics, reels, stories)

 • Producing multiple variations of content for testing

 • Supporting ad creative production (visual side)

 • Formatting and preparing content for publishing

 • Keeping content organized (folders, versions, calendar)

 • Assisting with research (competitors, references, trends)

 • Using tools like:

 • Figma / Canva

 • CapCut / Premiere / After Effects or editing tools for short video edits (content provided)

 • Using AI tools where useful (without making content look fake)







? What You Will NOT Do

 • Manage ads or Meta accounts

 • Handle budgets or campaign decisions

 • Define brand strategy

 • Own high-level copywriting



This role is about execution and output.







???? What We’re Looking For



You are:

 • Fast and detail-oriented

 • Able to create clean, premium-looking content

 • Good at following a specific brand style

 • Comfortable receiving direction and executing quickly

 • Organized and reliable



You have:

 • Experience creating content for Instagram or DTC brands

 • A strong portfolio (required)

 • Skills in design and/or video editing

 • Basic understanding of what makes content perform

 • Familiarity with AI tools (bonus)





?? Important



This is not for:

 • People who want to “rebrand everything”

 • Pure strategists

 • People who only want to give ideas



We need someone who can execute consistently at a high level.





???? Trial Period & Compensation



We start with a 1-month paid trial to ensure it’s a strong fit on both sides.

 • Starting rate: $8/hour

 • Fully remote

 • Opportunity to continue long-term based on performance



We value long-term relationships, but we move fast and prioritize performance.





???? Application Process



To apply, include:

 1. Your portfolio (Instagram, Figma, or website)

 2. 2–3 examples of content that match a premium aesthetic

 3. Answer this question:



If we give you 1 product image, how would you turn it into 5 different pieces of content?





???? Bonus Points

 • Experience in skincare, fashion, or premium brands

 • Strong visual taste (you know when something looks off)

 • Ability to work without constant supervision





Final note



We care more about taste, speed, and consistency than credentials.



If you can execute at a high level, you’ll do very well here.

title: Website Support VA
description:
Keeping websites tidy, speedy, up to date and looking their best.

This role focuses on supporting with all things web – updating content, spotting technical hiccups, and making sure our websites (ours and clients’) stay in tip-top shape. This will include maintenance tasks for clients such as updating content, and tweaking SEO, as well as helping complete new build sites.



What you'll handle:

Website updates

Uploading new content (text, images, links)

Swapping out testimonials, case studies or blog posts

Updating navigation, footers, and site-wide info

Styling tweaks using WordPress page builders like Elementor or Divi



Tech checks & fixes

Spotting broken links, wonky layouts or missing elements

Checking responsiveness and layout on mobile

Clearing caches and troubleshooting minor glitches

Testing site forms and tracking performance



Support with new launches

Helping prep sites for go-live

Tidying up loose ends or adding finishing touches

Doing a last pass to check everything looks polished



Requirements:

English speaking - not location specific

Can communicate during peak hours Mon-Fri 10am-2pm GMT

Be available to discuss projects via Zoom

Good communication skills

Great eye for detail

Broad skillset and understanding of all that goes into a great website

Able to work independently and execute designs to match an initial layout

In-depth experience with Divi

Experience with tools such as ManageWP, RankMath and Atarim would be beneficial but not compulsory



This role could potentially evolve to a Part-Time role, but initially would be on a gig basis.

title: GoHighLevel Operations Specialist — Full-Time
description:
WE ARE INTERVIEWING THIS FRIDAY (20/03). Apply now if you want to be considered.



Are you a GoHighLevel pro who knows the platform inside and out? We want to talk to you.

We help creators sell high-ticket online programs. We build their funnels, run their ads, write their
s, set up their webinars, and manage their CRM. We do all of this inside GoHighLevel.



We need someone who can own the GHL setup across our portfolio of creator clients. You will be the go-to person who builds, maintains, and fixes everything inside GoHighLevel. If it lives in GHL, it's yours.

This is not a general VA role. This is a specialist position for someone who truly knows GoHighLevel.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY



Build and manage GoHighLevel workflows for multiple creator clients —
 automations, SMS sequences, webinar reminders, CRM pipelines, and landing pages



Set up new funnels from scratch when we bring on a new client — registration pages, confirmation
s, reminder sequences, post-webinar follow-ups, booking flows



When something changes (a webinar date moves, a new offer launches, a funnel needs updating), you jump in and make it happen across all the right places so nothing breaks



Fix problems fast. If an automation stops working or
s aren't sending, you find the issue and solve it quickly. Our clients depend on this.



Connect GoHighLevel to other tools using Zapier or Make



Keep everything organized and documented in Notion so the rest of the team always knows what's set up and how it works

Manage multiple client accounts at the same time while keeping quality high across all of them



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



You know GoHighLevel very well. You've built real automations with conditional logic, multiple branches, if/then rules, and tag-based routing. Not just simple drip
s — actual complex workflows.



You've used Zapier or Make to connect GHL to other tools and platforms.



You can handle multiple clients without dropping the ball. You stay organized, you keep track of what needs to happen, and you don't let things slip through the cracks.



You're the type of person who spots a problem before anyone else notices it. You don't wait to be told — you fix it.

You've worked with course creators, coaches, or info product businesses before. You understand how webinar funnels work, what a sales pipeline looks like, and how
 sequences drive revenue.



You're comfortable with Notion, Google Workspace, and Zoom.



You communicate clearly. If there's an issue or a question, you speak up right away.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT



This is NOT a general virtual assistant job. We need a GHL specialist, not someone who does "a little bit of everything."

This is NOT managing social media, writing blog posts, or doing graphic design.

This is NOT a short-term project. This is a stable, full-time, long-term position.



WHY YOU SHOULD APPLY



You get to do what you're best at — GoHighLevel — every single day. No random tasks that waste your skills.

This is a full-time, long-term role with a growing company. We are adding more clients, which means more work, more responsibility, and more growth for you.



The people we hire now will become our senior tea
mbers as we scale. If you're looking for a role where you can grow into a leadership position, this is it.



You'll work directly with a small, fast-moving team. Your work matters here. No corporate bureaucracy, no being invisible in a large company.



Fully remote. Work from anywhere.



TOOLS YOU'LL USE



GoHighLevel, Zapier, Make, Notion, Google Workspace, Zoom



HOW TO APPLY

We are scheduling interviews this Friday. 

To be considered, you MUST submit your application through our application form here:







Your application MUST include a Loom introduction video. In your Loom (1-5 minutes), cover:



Introduce yourself and tell us about your GoHighLevel experience — how long you've been using it, what types of businesses you've supported, and what you've built



Show us the most complex automation or workflow you've built in GHL. Walk us through the triggers, conditions, and actions so we can see how you think.



Tell us about the business it was for and what results it helped achieve



We want to see your actual work and hear you explain it. Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.

Do NOT apply through OnlineJobs.ph messaging. Only applications submitted through the form link above will be considered.

title: Customer Support/Order Processing/Stock Management
description:
We run a small Brussels/Belgium-based luxury brand that produces leather watch straps and accessories for watch collectors worldwide. Our products are made in France and we sell globally through our Shopify store. We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented full-time tea
mber to help run the day-to-day operations of the business.



This is a multi-role position. You will be the operational backbone of the brand, handling customer service, social media, e-commerce operations,
 marketing, and general administrative tasks. You will work closely with the founder and report directly to him.





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



Someone who has real experience with Shopify, Klaviyo, Instagra
ta Business Suite, and ideally Odoo ERP. Someone who takes pride in writing well and communicating clearly in English. Someone who is organised, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple responsibilities without constant supervision. An appreciation for quality products and a willingness to learn about the world of luxury goods and watch collecting is a strong plus.





WHAT YOU WILL DO



Customer Service and Communication

- Respond to customer enquiries via
 and social media (pre-sale questions, order status, sizing guidance, returns)

- Maintain a warm, professional, and brand-appropriate tone in all communications

- Escalate complex issues to the founder when needed

- Follow up on open tickets and ensure every customer feels valued



Social Media Management

- Schedule and publish content on Instagram 

- Draft captions that match the brand's editorial, refined voice (training and guidelines provided)

- Monitor comments, DMs, and engagement and respond promptly

- Track basic performance metrics such as reach, engagement, and follower growth



Shopify and E-Commerce Operations

- Manage product listings: upload new products, update descriptions, adjust pricing and inventory

- Process and monitor orders and coordinate with shipping partners

- Handle returns, exchanges, and refunds per company policy

- Monitor stock levels and flag low-inventory items



 Marketing (Klaviyo)

- Build and send
 campaigns following brand templates and guidelines

- Manage subscriber lists, segments, and flows

- Track open rates, click rates, and revenue attribution

- Suggest improvements based on performance data



Odoo ERP

- Assist with order management, inventory tracking, and basic reporting in Odoo

- Keep records accurate and up to date across systems



General Virtual Assistance

- Calendar management, research, and ad hoc administrative tasks

- Help prepare materials for product launches and seasonal campaigns

- Maintain internal documents and SOPs





REQUIREMENTS



Must-have:

- Minimum 2 years of experience in e-commerce operations or a similar VA role

- Working proficiency with Shopify (backend, order management, product listings)

- Experience with Klaviyo or a similar
 marketing platform

- Comfortable with Instagram and Meta Business Suite

- Excellent written English — clear, professional, and grammatically correct

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

- Available full-time (40 hours/week) with a flexible schedule, as long as deadlines are met and communication is timely



Strong plus:

- Experience with Odoo ERP

- Background working with a luxury, fashion, or lifestyle brand

- Interest in watches, leather goods, or men's accessories

- Basic graphic skills (e.g. Canva) for social media assets



WHAT WE OFFER



- A long-term, stable full-time position with a growing European brand

- Direct collaboration with the founder — your input matters

- Comprehensive brand training including detailed voice guide, product knowledge, and customer profiles

- A respectful, professional working environment

- Room to grow as the brand scales





HOW TO APPLY



Please include in your application:



1. A brief introduction — who you are and why this role interests you

2. Your relevant experience with the tools listed above (Shopify, Klaviyo, Instagram, Odoo)

3. A link to any brand or store you have worked with, if available

4. Your expected monthly salary in USD



Important: In the first line of your application, please write the words "Blue Dawn" so I know you have read the full post. Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: Proactive E-commerce & Admin Assistant (Part-Time / High Autonomy)
description:
About the Role:



I am a busy entrepreneur running a car dealership alongside an active e-commerce business in Singapore. I do not have the time to micromanage. I am looking for a highly organized, independent, and proactive Virtual Assistant to take complete ownership of my daily task checklists.



You must be the kind of person who solves problems before I even notice them, suggests improvements to my systems, and can be trusted to manage the daily workflow flawlessly.



Schedule & Compensation:



Rate: $5.50 / hour (Approx. $500 / month)



Hours: 3 hours per day.



Schedule: 6 days a week on a fixed daily schedule (exact working hours are open for discussion).



Opportunity for Extra Pay: If you want to work 7 days a week to earn extra money, that option is always open. We can discuss this during the interview.



Core Responsibilities:



E-Commerce Daily Operations (Shopee/Lazada/1688): Fully manage the daily health and operations of multiple e-commerce stores. This includes executing customer service, processing specific pre-orders and 1688 orders, managing returns/refunds, monitoring inventory thresholds, entering platform campaigns, and actively checking for banned or deleted listings.



Automotive Business Admin (Fitz Automobile): Maintain back-end organization for a car dealership. This involves syncing vehicle prices across multiple listing platforms, diligently tracking and alerting me of road tax expirations, and organizing incoming invoices and new car data into Google Sheets.



Requirements



(Optional) Proven experience in E-commerce management (specifically Shopee/Lazada Seller Centers) and general administrative support.



Extreme attention to detail. you execute daily checklists with zero missed steps.



High level of autonomy; you know how to find answers and troubleshoot issues independently without waiting for instructions.



Strong organizational skills and the ability to work highly efficiently within a 3-hour daily window.



Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken).



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):



If you do not follow these instructions exactly, your application will be automatically deleted.



Subject Line: Make the subject line of your application: "Proactive VA: [Your Favorite Color] - [Your Name]"



Video Introduction: Record a 1-to-2-minute video introducing yourself. In the video, explain why you are a good fit for a highly autonomous role and give one example of a time you proactively solved a problem for a past client without being asked.



Written Question: In your application message, answer this briefly: If a product listing gets unexpectedly deleted by Lazada and I am unreachable, what are your immediate next steps?

title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator - Lead Generation - Admin
description:
We are not looking for a GENERAL virtual assistant.

We are looking for a true TRANSACTION COORDINATOR who understands the pace, professionalism, and precision required in real estate. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who is highly organized, detail-driven, proactive, and confident managing real estate files from start to closing. 

You will play a key role in keeping our transactions accurate, compliant, on schedule, and running smoothly so we can stay focused on serving clients and generating business.



*We will only consider candidates with experience previously working as Transaction Coordinator/working with contracts. 

Please do not apply unless you have worked at least 2 years as a "Transaction Coordinator".



This role is ideal for someone who already has experience supporting a US real estate team or brokerage and can step into the position with minimal hand-holding.

You take ownership.

You follow through.

You catch details others miss.

You communicate clearly and professionally.

You know how to keep files clean, timelines tight, and deals moving.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

Coordinating real estate transactions from signed listing or accepted offer through completion



Preparing, organizing, and managing contracts, disclosures, and transaction documents



Ensuring files are complete, accurate, and compliant



Tracking key dates including deposits, subject removals, completion, possession, and other important deadlines



Communicating with agents, clients, lawyers, conveyancers, inspectors, and cooperating agents



Uploading, organizing, and maintaining documents in Skyslope, Google Drive, and related systems



Assisting with listing paperwork and MLS-related coordination



Scheduling inspections, appointments, and transaction-related follow-up



Following checklists and systems to ensure nothing falls through the cracks



Proactively flagging missing documents, deadlines, or issues before they become problems



Required Experience



Minimum 2 years of experience in real estate transaction coordination, real estate administration, or a similar role



US real estate experience is required



Strong understanding of the US real estate transaction process



Experience handling contracts, disclosures, compliance documents, and transaction timelines



Excellent written and spoken English ( SPANISH A PLUS )



Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple files at once



High attention to detail and accuracy





Lead Gen: 

Need to be familiar with some lead generation on
 ads platform.

Adding leads, conversation notes, response times, and follow-up attempts into database.

Follow ups & Marketing homes to potential buyers.

Maintain the team CRM



Requirements:

Must have the ability to make phone calls and text messages to the US

High speed internet

Reliable up to date computer that can handle multitasking 

Non distracting quiet work environment 

Ability to personally handle multiple tasks at once. 

Must be able to have a audio/video Zoo
eting for your interview. 



Pay & Scheduling:

We will have you start Part Time with the opportunity to be a Full Time Employee, after careful consideration.

We will have a 2 week training/probationary period, where we will determine if you are a good fit for our company.

We pay every week on Sunday using Paypal.

You will be paid for the training and probationary period.

Base Pay can increase once qualified. Pay raises will be given frequently as the assistant shows improvement. 

We will pay a Bonus if you perform certain tasks with excellence. 

Great opportunity to make big bonus money... will discuss during interview.



Critical responsibilities for this job are the ability to follow directions. Please follow the instructions below. Any candidates not following application instructions will not be considered.



Please attach your updated resume (required), voice sample or any other evaluations you would like us to consider (optional). Please be sure your resume is detailed and outlines your work experience, what states you have worked in Real Estate, as we will be looking for certain factors when reviewing resumes. This is a Full Time job, may start out part time for the first 2 weeks of training, but transition to full time as you are fully trained. We are looking for someone long term and full time, exclusively to us. You must be available to work Monday to Friday during normal business hours Pacific time zone and possibly Saturdays for extra pay. 



To apply for the job:

1. Change the subject to “I want to work for you Casas Real Estate Group – Real estate assistant.”

2. At the top of the message, write 2-3 sentences why you think you are a right fit for this position. Fit your answer into 2-3 sentences.

3). Under that answer these following questions

a. Are you currently working any jobs? When are you available to start?

b. Are you available full time or part time?

c. Are you looking for long term or short term (contract) work?

d. When are you available to work (what time zone)? What hours?

e. What is your internet speed? Do you have a backup plan?

f. Where will you work this job? Do you have a work area where you won’t be interrupted when you are logged in?

g. Are you able to call/text with a US number? How will we communicate other than
?

h. Why do you want this position and what sets you apart from someone else?

4). 

a. When applying, please submit a one minute Voice Recording explaining why you are qualified for this position and state what you think you are best at doing. I am looking for a specific task that you believe is you strongest characteristic.



thank you !!

title: Operations Coordinator / Project Manager – Marketing Agency (Remote – Long-Term)
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and reliable Operations Coordinator to help manage projects for a growing marketing company.







This is a long-term position for someone who wants stability, responsibility, and the opportunity to grow into a management role.







You will help coordinate work between designers, clients, and the business owner.







The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, communicates clearly, and solves problems without waiting for instructions.







This role is not just a task job — it requires thinking, organization, and leadership potential.



Responsibilities







Your responsibilities will include:







• Assigning design projects to freelance designers



• Tracking project deadlines and progress



• Communicating with clients and providing updates



• Organizing files, folders, and client information



• Following up with designers to ensure deadlines are met



• Maintaining project boards and task lists



• Helping recruit and coordinate additional freelancers if needed



• Making suggestions to improve efficiency and workflow







You will become the central communication point for projects.



Requirements







Applicants must have:







• Excellent written and spoken English



• Strong organization skills



• Reliable internet connection



• Experience managing tasks or projects



• Ability to work independently without constant supervision



• Strong communication and problem-solving ability







Preferred experience:







• Project management



• Working with remote teams



• Marketing or creative agencies



• Managing freelancers



Working Hours







Flexible hours are possible, but daily communication and responsiveness are required.







We value reliability and consistency above everything.



Compensation







Starting pay: $5–$7 per hour







Pay increases will occur based on:







• reliability



• leadership ability



• communication



• performance







Long-term team members may grow into senior management roles with higher compensation.



Important Application Instructions (READ CAREFULLY)







To apply for this position, you must complete the following steps.







Applications that do not follow these steps will not be considered.



Step 1 — Create a Short Introduction Video







Record a 2–3 minute video answering the following questions:



Introduce yourself and your work experience.



Describe any experience managing projects, people, or freelancers.



Tell us about a time you solved a problem without being told exactly what to do.



Explain why you believe you would be a reliable long-term team member.







Upload your video to Google Drive



Step 2 — Answer This Question







If five design projects are due this week and two designers are running late, what steps would you take to ensure deadlines are still met?







We are interested in how you think, not just your experience.



Step 3 — Include This Word in Your Application







To show that you carefully read the instructions, include the word:







ORGANIZED

in the first line of your application message.



About the Company:

Vontage Marketing is a growing marketing company focused on helping businesses build strong brands, websites, and marketing materials.







We work with a variety of businesses and are building a team of reliable long-term professionals.







Our goal is to create a stable and professional remote team that grows together over time.



Final Note

We are not looking for someone who only waits for instructions.







We want someone who:



• takes ownership



• communicates clearly



• stays organized



• helps build systems that improve the business







If you are someone who wants responsibility and long-term growth, we encourage you to apply!!



How to Apply:

Due to high demand, all applicants must complete our short application form below.



???? Apply here: 



We will contact qualified applicants directly.





Thanks for your attention to this application!

title: Inbox Manager / Sales Rep
description:
Job Description:

We’re hiring a highly driven Inbox Manager / Sales Rep to join our team.



This is not a basic admin role. We want someone sharp, fast, confident in English, and hungry to help turn positive replies into booked calls.



You’ll be managing cold
 inboxes for a range of agency clients, replying quickly to leads, handling conversations professionally, and moving interested prospects toward booking a call with the salesperson inside each client business.



Some of our clients will also require calling prospects who have replied positively. That means this role is ideal for someone who is not just organised and responsive, but also confident in sales conversations and comfortable on the phone.



You’ll typically be managing around 5 to 15 clients at a time.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Managing inboxes for cold
 campaigns



Replying quickly to positive and interested leads



Having natural sales conversations over



Moving prospects toward booked calls



Following booking processes and sales scripts



Calling warm prospects for specific client campaigns when needed



Working across multiple clients and keeping things organised



Coordinating with our internal team to keep campaigns moving



Who We’re Looking For:



Strong written and spoken English



Confident communicator



Sales-minded and persuasive without sounding pushy



Fast responder with strong attention to detail



Comfortable handling multiple clients and inboxes



Hungry, reliable, and motivated to perform



Previous cold calling or sales experience is a big advantage



Experience in appointment setting, lead follow-up, or inbox management is preferred



Pay:



$3.75 USD per hour from our agency



Additional pay opportunities from one of our partner client campaigns



Small commission / bonus per call booked for specific calling campaigns



Strong performers can increase earnings meaningfully through incentives



Important:

This is a blended role. You will be working with us as part of our team, but for some calling work you may also be integrated into one of our client campaigns. We will train you, manage you, and support you closely.



This role suits someone who wants more than a basic remote job and is motivated by performance, sales, and growth.



How To Apply:

To apply, click the Google Form below and complete the application:







As part of your application, you must create a personalised Loom video and submit the Loom link inside the Google Form.



In your Loom video, tell us:



What sales experience you have



Why you are interested in a remote role focused on cold
 and sales



Why you believe you would be a good fit for this role

title: E-commerce Product Researcher & Listing Specialist – Fashion (Dropshipping)
description:
E-commerce Product Researcher & Listing Specialist – Fashion (Dropshipping)



Location: Remote

Type: Freelance / Part-time

Department: E-commerce Operations

Industry: Fashion – Dropshipping



***



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a growing men's fashion dropshipping brand selling across multiple European and English-speaking markets. We're looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Product Researcher & Listing Specialist who can find winning products, list them professionally, and keep our Shopify store accurate and optimised at all times.



This is a hands-on role that combines market research, SEO writing, Shopify product management, and data accuracy. You will be working with clear SOPs, structured templates, and a direct line of communication with the store owner. If you are organised, self-driven, and have an eye for what sells — this role is built for you.



***



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Product Research

- Find winning fashion products using competitor stores, Meta Ads Library, AliExpress bestsellers, and Google Shopping (with VPN)

- Validate every product using Google Trends across markets

- Only select products at Early Peak or Mid Peak - never at Late Peak or off-season

- Identify at least 1 competitor store selling the same or similar product, and record pricing and category

- Document all findings in a structured Google Sheets research tracker, including supplier links, competitor links, pricing, trend timing, and priority (High / Medium / Low)

- Set product status to New daily so the owner can review and approve



Product Listing (Shopify)

- Create complete, SEO-optimised product listings in the correct store language (translations included)

- Rewrite product titles and descriptions following agreed templates and SEO guidelines

- Set clean, SEO-friendly URLs for every product

- Assign products to the correct collections and metafields

- Set prices according to the pricing SOP provided

- Add and update size charts based on supplier information

- Keep stock availability accurate and up to date

- Flag any missing assets or unclear information before submitting for review — never guess



Product Optimisation & Accuracy

- Update existing listings when stock, sizes, colors, or product descriptions change

- Ensure all size charts match the supplier's current specifications

- Maintain full listing accuracy across multiple country-specific Shopify storefronts

- Use AI tools for translations and content rewriting where appropriate, always checking for quality



***



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Experience with Shopify — creating and managing product listings

- Strong understanding of SEO basics for e-commerce (titles, descriptions, URLs)

- Ability to use Google Trends to evaluate product demand and timing

- Familiarity with AliExpress, Meta Ads Library, and competitor research

- Highly organised with a structured, process-driven work style

- Comfortable working with Google Sheets for tracking and documentation

- Good written English; ability to translate or rewrite content clearly using AI tools

- Able to work independently and meet a consistent daily output target



***



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with fashion or clothing e-commerce

- Knowledge of dropshipping workflows

- Familiarity with product feed apps or Shopify metafields



***



HOW SUCCESS IS MEASURED



- New researched products added per day with all required fields complete

- Low error rate on listings — minimal corrections needed during owner review

- Consistent use of templates, SEO rules, and size chart accuracy

- Timely and accurate updates to existing listings when supplier info changes



***



WHAT WE OFFER



- Fully remote, flexible working hours

- Clear SOPs, templates, and onboarding — no guesswork

- Direct collaboration with the store owner

- A structured role with room to grow as the brand scales

- Nice team

- payment of 300 usd with monthly bonus



***



Do you have a sharp eye for winning products and a structured approach to listing them? Apply now and become a key part of our e-commerce operation.

title: R&D Pipeline Manager — Amazon Supplement Brands (Helium 10 Required)
description:
**About Us**



We run two supplement brands on Amazon USA and TikTok Shop: (liquid drops, capsules, gummies, mushroom coffee, functional teas, powders). We are based in Brooklyn, NY.



**The Role**



We need one person to own our entire product research and development pipeline. You will be the person who decides what products we build next — from identifying market opportunities to proposing formulas to developing packaging strategy.



You work directly with the company founder. No manager in between. Your research goes straight into production decisions.

What You Will Do



**Weekly Market Intelligence**



-Pull raw data from Brand Analytics, TikTok (Kalodata), SmartScout, and Helium 10. Upload to our Claude AI system to generate a weekly Market 360 report. Review the AI output, check for errors, paste prior week signals for continuity. You manage this process end to end.

-Competitor Research and Signal Scouting (8-10 hrs/wk)

-Browse competitor storefronts on Amazon (Clean Nutra, NutraHarmony, Physician's Choice, Thorne, Nutricost, Micro Ingredients). Track their new launches. Watch TikTok supplement trends. Find opportunities before they appear in keyword data. Update our competitor tracker spreadsheet weekly.



**Niche Analysis Reports **



When you find an opportunity, build a complete analysis using our template (32-item checklist): anchor keywords, Page 1 audit with screenshots, competitor formula teardowns, review mining, TikTok validation, pricing analysis, COGs estimate, and a GO/NO-GO recommendation. Target: 3-4 analyses per week.



**Formula and Packaging Direction** 



Propose ingredient stacks with branded ingredients (KSM-66, AstaReal, BioPerine). Estimate COGs per bottle. Justify format decisions (capsule vs. liquid vs. gummy). Develop packaging wireframe briefs — what goes on the front of the bottle, what makes this product stand out on Amazon Page 1.



**Tools We Provide Access To**



Helium 10 (keyword research, Cerebro, new product tracker)

SmartScout (category revenue, brand tracking, product data)

DataDive (niche analysis, keyword landscape)

Kalodata (TikTok Shop product revenue and trends)

Brand Analytics data (provided weekly)

Claude AI by Anthropic (for Market 360 report and product specs)

Slack (all communication, templates, and trackers)



**Requirements**



You MUST have experience with Amazon supplement products (not just Amazon in general — supplements specifically)

You MUST have used Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar Amazon research tools on real products

You can read a Supplement Facts Panel and identify underdosing, generic vs. branded ingredients, and formulation gaps

You understand Amazon keyword research — search volume, search frequency rank, buyer intent vs. informational keywords

You are comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) for research and analysis

Strong English writing skills — your reports go directly to the owner



**Nice to Have**



Experience with TikTok Shop or Kalodata

SmartScout or DataDive experience

COGs estimation and supplement manufacturing knowledge

Packaging design direction or creative brief experience

Health, nutrition, or supplement science background



**Compensation**



-$10-15/hr (higher for exceptional experience)

-20-30 hours per week, flexible schedule (your timezone is fine)

-All research tools provided at no cost to you

-This role grows to full-time (40 hrs/wk) with increased pay for the right person



**How to Apply** — SCREENING TEST REQUIRED

Do NOT send a generic application. Answer these four questions directly. Applications without all four answers will be ignored.



-Pick any supplement product on Amazon. Give me the ASIN. Tell me three things the brand did right and two things they did wrong. Be specific — mention actual ingredients, doses, keywords, or positioning.

-What is the difference between Magnesium Oxide, Magnesium Glycinate, and Magnesium L-Threonate? Why would a supplement brand choose one form over another? 2-3 sentences is enough.

-Name one supplement category on Amazon that you think is underserved right now. Why? What data supports your answer? If you have Helium 10 access, include a screenshot.

-Search "astaxanthin supplements" on Amazon. Look at Page 1. If you were launching a new astaxanthin product, what would you put on the front of the bottle to stand out? What specific claim or visual would make a customer stop scrolling?



Also include:



Your supplement/Amazon experience (which companies, what you did)

Which research tools you have used

Any experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

Your hourly rate expectation



What Happens Next

We review within 48 hours. Strong candidates get a paid trial assignment: one full niche analysis using our template and tools. That deliverable is the interview — not a Zoom call.

title: Photo and Video Editor
description:
**About Us**



Harlem Brands, Inc. is the parent company of Harlem Candle Company and Harlem Perfume Co., two luxury lifestyle brands rooted in the cultural legacy of the Harlem Renaissance. Our visual identity is central to everything we do - from our Sephora presence to our social media storytelling - and we are looking for a talented editor who can bring our brand world to life through compelling photo and video content.



**Role Overview**



We are seeking a skilled and self-directed Photo & Video Editor to join our creative team on a remote, contract basis. The ideal candidate is a natural storyteller with a sharp eye for luxury aesthetics, a strong command of editing tools, and the ability to work independently from raw assets through to final delivery across multiple platforms.



**Photo Editing Responsibilities**



- Curate and select the strongest images from model and product shoot galleries

- Edit lifestyle and campaign images featuring models with perfume bottles and candles, including skin retouching, color grading, and background refinement

- Edit product-only images in lifestyle settings with attention to light, shadow, and brand aesthetic

- Make precise adjustments to logos and labels on perfume bottles and candle vessels to ensure accuracy, consistency, and visual polish across all assets



**Video Editing Responsibilities**



- Edit raw event footage into polished recap and brand storytelling videos

- Produce high-converting video ads for Google and Meta 
/Instagram) campaigns

- Create platform-optimized content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube, including short-form and long-form formats

- Apply color grading, sound design, music selection, captions, and motion graphics as needed

- Deliver final files in all required formats, aspect ratios, and specifications for each platform (1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9)



**Requirements**



- Proven experience in photo and video editing for a luxury, beauty, or lifestyle brand

- Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Lightroom, Premiere Pro, and After Effects (or equivalent tools)

- Strong storytelling ability — you understand how to build narrative and emotion through imagery and editing rhythm

- Ability to work independently, manage deadlines, and communicate proactively without close supervision

- Experience editing product photography with labels, logos, and packaging

- Deep understanding of platform-specific video formats, specs, and best practices for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Google, and Meta

- Portfolio demonstrating beauty, lifestyle, or luxury brand work is required



**Nice to Have**



- Experience working with fragrance, beauty, or CPG brands

- Familiarity with Sephora or prestige retail visual standards

- Motion graphics or animation skills

- Experience editing content for culturally-driven or heritage brands



Please submit your portfolio, a brief introduction, and your availability. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



This is a remote position open to international candidates. We are looking for a long-term creative partner who will grow with the brand.

title: Creative Strategist
description:
Fill out form: (ADD PORFOLIO IN FORM)





Creative Strategist Full-Time (UMAEZ Ltd)



We’re hiring a data-obsessed Creative Strategist with 3+ years of experience who thrives in a high-velocity testing environment (20–30 concepts weekly) to unlock and scale profitable ad spend on cold traffic across our DTC portfolio.



Please do not apply if you don’t have real experience in ad creative strategy or direct-response copywriting.



Compensation: Competitive base salary + performance-based commissions (top performers can reach five figures during the trial period)



Location: Remote (Full-Time)

Schedule: Monday–Friday 



About US



Our company operates a portfolio of performance-led DTC brands across both US and SEA markets. We run a structured, data-driven creative system where testing velocity and iteration discipline directly determine growth.



Advantage: You’ll get a chance to have hands-on experience working on 7–8 figure brands within our portfolio and learn how creative strategy differs between US and SEA markets (audience psychology, formats, offers, and scaling patterns).



What You’ll Do



Research & Concept Development

-Conduct deep research into high-impact angles, unique mechanisms, and market awareness stages to develop breakthrough concepts

-Study competitive intelligence (ad spying), consumer psychology (mass desire & market awareness), and internal winners to identify untapped opportunities

-Develop 20–30 net-new concepts tested weekly (minimum) to maintain velocity and uncover winners for the brand (s)  assigned to you



Scriptwriting & Creative Execution

-Write compelling, high-converting direct-response scripts designed to hook cold audiences and convert them into buyers

-Produce clear, detailed briefs for editors and designers to ensure rapid alignment and execution

-Own the creative pipeline for assigned offers, driving the process from research ? ideation to scripting ? post-launch performance analysis



Collaboration & Iteration (Creative Engine)

-Work closely with our Lead Strategists on the higher strategic level and with editors and designers on the execution level to bring concepts to life at a high standard

-Collaborate with growth/media teams to iterate based on performance feedback and improve ROI

-Leverage proven copy structures, frameworks, and past winners to accelerate testing

-Feed insights back to the wider team to continuously improve our creative playbook



Performance Analysis & Scaling

-Analyze winners and losers weekly and document your learnings

-Rapidly iterate winning concepts into multiple variations to validate and scale

-Maintain a consistent pipeline of fresh creatives to reduce fatigue and sustain conversion



Required Qualifications

-Direct response expertise: Strong bias toward testing, iteration, and measurable results; understands how to profitably convert cold traffic

-Proven copywriting skills: Ability to write persuasive hooks and scripts (regular video ads, static ads or UGC ads) for Meta/TikTok/ in the DR advertising field

-Obsessive researcher: Strong at competitor intel, consumer psychology, awareness stages, and mechanism-driven angles

-Fast learner & hungry: Can absorb frameworks quickly and thrive under high output expectations

-A Player mentality (Resilience + ownership): Comfortable with rapid feedback cycles and treating assigned offers like a business unit



Success Looks Like (Core KPIs)

-High volume output: Consistently launching 20–30 net-new concepts/week (minimum)

-Creative hit rate: Achieving 10%+ hit rate (winners that validate and scale)



Why Join Us?

-Work on 7–8 figure brands across US or SEA markets

-Performance-based upside: Base + commissions tied directly to winners and scaling impact

-High ownership: Your concepts directly influence spend, revenue, and growth ceilings

-Rapid learning environment: Proven frameworks, strong feedback loops, and high iteration cadence

-Real career growth: Clear path to take on larger scope, priority brands, or lead responsibilities



Why You Shouldn’t Apply

-You want to coast or spend weeks polishing one campaign this role requires speed, iteration, and high quality output

-You struggle with high volume requirements, following operational workflows or processes, or fast feedback cycles

-You’re uncomfortable with the reality that most ads fail before one wins

-You need step-by-step hand-holding or don’t like ownership

-You’re balancing multiple jobs or clients this requires full-time dedicated ownership



Hiring Process

1. Fill out form: 

2. Once screened, you'll do skills assessment test

3. Interview

title: Executive Virtual Assistant (Operations & Content Coordination)
description:
**Job Title:** Executive Virtual Assistant (Operations & Content Coordination)



**Salary:** ?15,000 – ?25,000/month (Part-time, with growth potential)

**Schedule:** 4–6 hours/day (flexible, but must overlap in the afternoon/evening PH time)



---



### **About the Role**



I’m a founder managing multiple fast-moving projects — including an e-commerce brand, content production, and freelance work.



I’m looking for an **Executive Virtual Assistant** who can help organize operations, track tasks, and ensure things actually get done on time.



This is not a basic admin role.

I need someone who can **think, follow through, and keep things moving without constant supervision.**



---



### **What You’ll Be Responsible For**



**1. Task & Priority Management**



* Maintain a master task tracker (Notion or Google Sheets)

* Organize tasks across different projects

* Send a simple daily summary:



  * Top priorities

  * Pending tasks

  * Deadlines



**2. Follow-ups & Coordination**



* Follow up with tea
mbers (editors, VAs, etc.)

* Ensure deadlines are met

* Flag delays or blockers early



**3. Content Production Tracking**



* Track video workflow:



  * Script ? Editing ? Revisions ? Final

* Help ensure daily output targets are met



**4. General Organization**



* Keep files, trackers, and systems clean and updated

* Help improve workflows over time



---



### **What I’m Looking For**



You are:



* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Proactive (you don’t wait to be told everything)

* Comfortable managing multiple moving tasks

* Clear and concise in communication

* Calm under pressure



**Bonus (not required):**



* Experience with content teams or video production workflows

* Familiar with Notion, Google Sheets, Slack



---



### **What This Role Is NOT**



* Not purely data entry

* Not just “waiting for instructions”

* Not a passive assistant role



If you prefer very detailed step-by-step instructions for everything, this is not the right fit.



---



### **Why This Role Is Valuable**



You’ll be working directly with a founder and will:



* Learn how operations and content systems actually run

* Be part of scaling workflows and systems

* Have room to grow into a bigger role over time



---



### **How to Apply**



To apply, include:



1. A short intro about yourself

2. Your experience with task tracking or coordination

3. Your favorite productivity tool and why

4. The word **“ORGANIZED”** in your subject line



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Marketing Content Creation
description:
Role Summary

You will use our internal content system to generate daily marketing content from real customer wins, FAQs, and product updates. Your job is to turn those inputs into ready-to-post short-form scripts and captions, maintain a posting queue, and keep everything organized.



This is not a “creative from scratch” job — we already have templates and a proven system. We need someone consistent, fast, and organized.



Hours

Part-time: 1–3 hours/day



5–6 days/week preferred



Output-based expectations (daily content targets listed below)



Daily Responsibilities

Pull Proof + Inputs



Check new win/testimonial submissions (screenshots, milestones, stories)



Collect 3–5 FAQs/objections from community messages



Log inputs into the content inbox



Generate Content Using Our System

Generate:



2 short-form video scripts/day (15–30 seconds)



3–5 captions/posts/day (IG/Threads/X style)



1 quick proof post/day (win highlight / screenshot story)



Quality Control + Brand Voice



Ensure hooks are strong and simple



Keep language “mass-market” (reselling/workflow/automation) — avoid niche jargon in hooks



No income guarantees, no spammy claims



Fix grammar, tighten wording, remove fluff



Approve + Queue



Put finished content into our posting queue



Label each asset clearly (Platform + Persona + Theme)



Drop the daily content pack into our internal chat for review



Weekly Responsibilities

Build 1 Affiliate Content Pack (copy/paste posts + scripts)



Publish/update the “Win of the Week” proof post



Maintain a simple tracker: what was posted + performance notes (views, likes, comments, CTR if available)



Output Expectations (Realistic)

Per day (1–3 hours):



2 short-form scripts (TikTok/Reels/Shorts)



3–5 social captions/posts



1 proof-based post (win highlight)

Per week:



1 affiliate pack (10 posts + 3 scripts + 5 story templates)



Tools You’ll Use

Our internal content system (templates + generators)



Canva (optional, simple templates for proof cards)



Google Drive (organizing content)



/
 (pull FAQs + community messages)



What We’re Looking For

Strong written English (short, punchy, clear)



Understands marketing hooks + short-form content style



Extremely consistent and organized



Can follow a system and hit daily output targets



Bonus: experience with TikTok/Reels/Shorts scripts, Canva templates, or e-commerce/reselling



Quick Test (Required)

To apply, send:



A short note about your experience (2–5 sentences)



Write 3 hooks for a short video about “listing faster to scale reselling”



Turn this win into a 20-second script (we’ll provide the win text)



Pay

Part-time daily work (1–3 hrs/day)



Weekly pay via your preferred method



Opportunity for increased hours and bonuses based on performance/consistency

title: Full-Stack Developer – AI SaaS Platforms (React / Node.js / OpenAI)
description:
About the Role



We are a Sydney-based software development agency looking for a skilled full-stack developer to take end-to-end ownership of AI-powered SaaS platforms we are building for clients. You will be working across AI projects including multi-provider orchestration pipelines, RAG-based content generation, programmatic document processing, and full multi-tenant SaaS builds. Detailed specifications are ready to go. You will be the primary developer, working directly with our technical lead and project manager.



This is a remote, exclusive role. You must be available during Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST/AEDT) business hours.



The Work



You will be building full SaaS applications from scratch using React 18, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and TypeScript. The projects are heavily AI-integrated and involve real technical complexity — this is not a CRUD app role.



AI Orchestration and Multi-Provider Pipelines

Work includes building custom orchestration layers that chain multiple AI providers in sequence (including OpenAI, Claude, and Perplexity). You will implement pipeline logic covering parallelism, retry strategies with exponential backoff, rate limit management across providers, and streaming responses via SSE.



RAG and Vector Store Architecture

Projects include work with the OpenAI Responses API, file_search, and managed vector stores to generate AI content grounded in client knowledge bases. The retrieval architecture uses a multi-store design separating shared expert knowledge from per-client and per-job data — shaped by the two-vector-store-per-call constraint on the Responses API. You will build setup scripts, sync logic, metadata filtering, and the full generation pipeline.



Document Processing and Assembly

Work includes parsing uploaded PDF and DOCX files using Azure Document Intelligence to extract questions, tables, and document structure, then mapping AI-generated content back into the original document format without breaking layout or formatting. This is among the most technically demanding work in the engagement and a key competitive differentiator for our clients.



SaaS Platform Features

Projects involve full multi-tenant SaaS applications including user authentication, subscription billing via Stripe and/or Chargebee (webhooks, billing portal, feature gating by tier), knowledge base management, file uploads, admin portals, and health check engines.



What You Will Be Doing



Building AI-powered SaaS platforms end-to-end from detailed functional and technical specifications

Implementing multi-provider AI orchestration pipelines with parallelism, retry logic, and rate limit management

Setting up and managing OpenAI vector stores: file sync scripts, metadata attributes, multi-store retrieval architecture

Solving document mapping challenges: parsing input documents with Azure Document Intelligence and assembling correctly formatted DOCX outputs from AI-generated content

Building full SaaS platform features: auth, subscription billing, multi-tenancy, feature gating, file uploads, admin workflows

Writing production-quality, well-typed TypeScript across frontend and backend

Reading and building from specification documents — raising questions where specs are ambiguous or incomplete

Participating in standups, providing regular progress updates, and communicating blockers early



Requirements



Must Have



5+ years of professional full-stack development with React and Node.js as your primary stack

Strong TypeScript across frontend and backend — comfortable with type inference, generics, and type-safe ORM usage

PostgreSQL with a modern ORM (Drizzle preferred, Prisma acceptable) — schema design, migrations, query optimisation

Solid third-party API integration experience — authentication, webhooks, error handling

OpenAI API experience, ideally the Responses API, file_search, and vector store management; if not, you must be a fast learner from documentation

Azure Document Intelligence

Experience parsing or generating documents programmatically (PDF, DOCX) — extracting structured data from unstructured sources or producing formatted output from code

Stripe integration experience — subscription billing, webhooks, billing portal

Ability to work independently from detailed specifications without needing hand-holding on every decision



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



A brief summary of your relevant experience, specifically addressing the AI and document processing requirements

A PDF or Google Doc link to your CV — applications without a CV will not be considered

Links to projects or repositories that demonstrate your full-stack work (GitHub, portfolio, or live projects)

Confirmation that you are: OK with screenshot capture software for time tracking; available during Sydney (AEST/AEDT) business hours; happy in an exclusive role with no paid or unpaid freelance work on the side; and willing to undergo a live technical assessment as part of the interview process
