title: Sales & Marketing Assistant
description:
Location: Remote, work from home aligned to Australian time. Hours: Full-time, aligned with Australian business hours (e.g., 9 AM – 5 PM AEST).



Role Overview: Our client is seeking a highly organised and proactive Sales & Marketing Assistant to provide day-to-day support to the Sales and Marketing teams. This role focuses on managing increased business volume by handling essential sales administration, maintaining CRM data integrity, and enhancing the company’s digital presence. The successful candidate will ensure that the sales team can focus on high-value conversion activities by maintaining the systems and records that drive lead generation and a consistent, high-quality client experience.



Core Accountabilities

- CRM Integrity & Data Accuracy: Maintain a "single source of truth" within the CRM, ensuring all lead and contact data is cleansed, categorized, and up-to-date to support reliable business reporting.

- Sales Process Support: Execute the administrative "back-end" of the sales cycle, ensuring proposals, agreements, and follow-ups are handled promptly so no opportunities fall through the cracks.

- Marketing Execution: Support the company’s growth by scheduling and publishing social media content and assisting with campaign tracking to feed the sales funnel.

- Client Experience & Triage: Act as a professional first point of contact for inbound inquiries, using logic and common sense to triage leads and ensure they reach the right tea
mber.



Key Responsibilities

- CRM Administration (HubSpot & Zendesk): Perform intensive data cleansing, including updating contact records from amalgamated entities and populating missing industry/segmentation fields for thousands of records.

- Lead Management: Monitor incoming leads via Zendesk and the CRM; qualify and assign leads based on established criteria and use macros for efficient follow-up.

- Sales Documentation: Prepare and send professional sales documentation, including proposals, quotes, and presentations; track their status and prompt the team for follow-ups.

- Social Media Management: Schedule and publish approved content across 
 and
; monitor engagement and provide basic reporting on reach and lead sources.

- Content Assistance: Use tools like Canva to make minor updates to marketing materials and assist in the preparation of internal and external communications.

- Reporting: Track daily sales activities and marketing performance to assist in the creation of weekly and monthly management reports.

- Team Participation: Actively participate in the Monday 9:00 AM (AEST) tea
eting and contribute to monthly team building and social activities.



Qualifications & Experience

Must-Have Experience

- Proven Background: 4-5 years experience in a Sales Assistant, Marketing Assistant, or Virtual Assistant role, preferably supporting Australian-based businesses.

- Technical Proficiency: Advanced skills in the Microsoft 365 suite (Excel, Word, and Outlook).

- CRM Expertise: Hands-on experience with CRM systems (HubSpot and Zendesk highly regarded) with a high degree of accuracy in data entry.

- English Fluency: Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills, with the ability to draft professional
s and interact with clients logically.



Additional Experience

- Design Tools: Familiarity with Canva for basic graphic design tasks.

- Specialized Knowledge: A basic understanding of (or a strong willingness to learn) Australian HR legislation, industry awards, and franchising business models.

- B2B Context: Experience working within a service-based or B2B environment.



Skills & Attributes

- High Attention to Detail: Essential for managing complex CRM data and ensuring all client-facing documentation is error-free.

- Logical Problem-Solving: The ability to think critically when triaging inquiries and determine the best course of action without constant supervision.

- Growth Mindset: A proactive desire to learn the nuances of the business and progress from administrative tasks to more complex client-support functions.

- Collaborative & Bubbly: A positive, engaging personality that contributes to a cohesive and high-performing remote team culture.



Please send your resume and voice recording to 
 those with voice recording will be considered. Thanks!

title: Senior Meta Ads Media Buyer – High-Spend E-Commerce ($250K+/mo)
description:
We are looking for a proven Media Buyer with real experience in scaling Meta Ads for e-commerce.



This is not an entry-level role.



We operate a fast-growing dropshipping business where we test and scale multiple products across multiple markets, currently managing €250,000+ per month in ad spend.



We move fast, make decisions based on data, and aggressively scale what works.



If you thrive in a high-performance, results-driven environment and know how to turn data into profit, this role is for you.



What You'll Be Doing



- Managing and scaling Meta 
) ad campaigns across multiple markets



- Making daily decisions on scaling, killing, and optimizing ads



- Identifying winning creatives and scaling them aggressively



- Monitoring performance metrics such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, and CPM



- Collaborating closely with the creative and strategy teams



- Continuously testing new angles, creatives, and audiences



Requirements (Important – Read Carefully)



We are only looking for candidates who:



- Have proven experience scaling Meta Ads for e-commerce or dropshipping



- Have managed at least $200,000+ per month in ad spend (or had similar responsibility within a larger account)



- Understand how to scale winning campaigns profitably (not just run ads)



- Have experience managing multiple campaigns or products at the same time



- Can clearly explain their decision-making process based on data



- Are comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment



- Are available around midnight UK time



- Can work Monday to Saturday



Not a Fit If You



- Only managed small budgets (below $150,000/month)



- Cannot show proof of real scaling experience



- Have only theoretical knowledge



- Prefer slow or highly structured corporate environments



What We Offer



- A long-term position in a fast-growing e-commerce company



- Opportunity to manage €250,000+ monthly ad spend across multiple markets



- Direct collaboration with experienced founders and a strong team



- A performance-driven environment with real growth opportunities



- Competitive salary based on experience



How to Apply (Mandatory)



To be considered, you must include the following:



- A brief introduction about yourself



- Your experience with Meta Ads, including:



Monthly ad spend managed



Example results (ROAS / CPA)



A Loom video (2–5 minutes) explaining:



A campaign you scaled



What you did and why



Screenshots or proof of results (if available)



* Applications without this information will not be considered.



Final Note



We are building a serious team focused on scaling winning products.



If you are confident in your skills and want to grow fast, we would love to hear from you.



* Start your application with the word “Scale” so we know you read everything.

title: Youtube Video Editor for Young Female Entrepreneur - Business, Travel & Behind-the-Scenes Content
description:
YouTube Channel · Video Editor — Job Description



About the Role

We're looking for a video editor to join the Tiffany Parra YouTube team — a fully remote team of 6 people creating content around digital marketing, ecommerce, and what it actually takes to build and scale an online business.



Tiffany bootstrapped her Shopify brand to $11M+ in lifetime sales and $2M+ in annual revenue, driving $700K–$800K from SEO-driven traffic alone in under a year. Her content is direct, practical, and honest — sharing real numbers, real failures, and real systems.



This is an ongoing role with consistent work available. Long-form videos are the core deliverable, with short-form content (Shorts/Reels) available in between.



About the Channel

You can explore the channel 
 on YouTube



Content covers:

Ecommerce and Shopify SEO strategy (keyword intent, collection/product page structure, content marketing, backlinks)

Real case studies from scaling a high-ticket online store organically

Personal brand content — setbacks, rebuilds, and transparent storytelling

Day-in-the-life, travel (currently traveling), fitness, and behind-the-scenes business content



The tone is direct, grounded, and transparent — not corporate, not over-polished. Think smart editing that enhances the story without stealing the show.



What You'll Do

Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–10 minutes) from raw footage + a detailed scene-by-scene editor brief

Cut for pacing and clarity — keeping content tight and engaging throughout

Add b-roll, text overlays, captions, motion graphics, and animated callouts per brief specs

Match the brand's color system and visual style consistently across all videos

Edit short-form vertical content (YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels) as it becomes available

Incorporate feedback efficiently and hit turnaround deadlines



What the Briefs Look Like

Our editor briefs are detailed and scene-by-scene — covering transcript, text overlays, b-roll direction, motion graphics specs, sound effects, brand colors, and asset links. Here's a real example: View Example Brief.



Briefs include: brand color hex codes, font specs (Inter Bold 700), animation style references, sound effect cues, screen recording links, logo/asset sources, and full transcript with timestamps. You won't be guessing — but you do need to be able to execute independently from a written spec.



And here's an example of a finished video so you can see what we're going for: Watch Example Video.



What We're Looking For

Must-Haves

Experience editing YouTube content — especially talking-head or educational/lifestyle hybrid videos

Able to execute from a detailed brief: text overlays, motion graphics, split-screens, animated callouts, sound FX

Strong sense of pacing — you know when to cut and when to breathe

Comfortable working independently from written specs without hand-holding

Reliable, communicative, and meets deadlines

Portfolio or links to YouTube edits you've done



Nice-to-Haves

Experience editing in the business, marketing, or personal finance creator space

Comfortable with short-form vertical editing (Reels, Shorts)

Experience with motion graphics — animated text callouts, logo reveals, diagram builds

Ability to flag missing assets or unclear brief sections before starting rather than mid-edit



Compensation & Logistics

Pay:$30-$60 per long-form video (8–10 minutes), based on experience

Short-form content compensated separately as it becomes available

Fully remote — work from wherever you are

Ongoing role with consistent volume — this isn't a one-off project

Team of 6; collaborative and async-friendly

Starting ASAP



How to Apply

Send us the following:

2–3 examples of YouTube videos you've edited (links preferred)

A brief note on your editing style and what you enjoy working on

Your current turnaround time for an 8–10 minute video from a detailed brief

Your preferred editing software



Send all material to 
 with the subject line: EDITOR-YOUR NAME



We'll review applications on a rolling basis and reach out to set up a short test edit for top candidates. Watch the example video and review the example brief before applying — we'll ask about both.

title: Tiktok Creator Outreach Manager
description:
TikTok Creator Hunter (Full-Time, Remote) – Earn $300–$2,000+/Month**



We are hiring full-time TikTok operators to help us grow a fast-scaling AI app in the **male self-improvement / looksmax niche**.



This is a **simple, repeatable job with clear daily tasks and performance bonuses.**



**YOUR MAIN TASK**



You will:

• Find TikTok creators in the looksmax / glow-up niche

• Record their usernames in our system

• Send outreach messages (we provide scripts)

• Follow up and track replies



No advanced skills needed. We will train you.



**DAILY WORK (6–8 HOURS)**



• Scroll TikTok and find creators

• Input data into Google Sheets / CRM

• Send messages (high volume)

• Follow up on conversations



This is a **high-output role**. Speed and consistency matter.



**COMPENSATION**



• Base salary: $300/month

• Performance bonuses (based on results)



Typical earnings:

• Average: $400–$800/month

• Top performers: $1,000–$2,000+/month



The more creators you bring in, the more you earn.



**WHY JOIN US**



• Stable, long-term role

• Clear system and training provided

• Performance-based growth

• Opportunity to become team lead



We already have working creators and proven results.



**REQUIREMENTS**

• Familiar with TikTok (you use it regularly)

• Fast worker and detail-oriented

• Comfortable sending 200+ messages per day

• Good written English

• Reliable internet and availability



**IMPORTANT**



This is NOT a passive job.



We are looking for people who:

• Work fast

• Follow instructions

• Want to earn more through performance





**HOW TO APPLY**



1. Fill out this form:

   



2. Include the word **“TIKTOK”** in your application



We are hiring immediately.

title: Creative Strategist & Ad Creative Editor
description:
JAJE Health is a fast-growing Australia supplement brand looking for a high-level Creative Strategist who can create high-converting static and video ads for Meta and TikTok. We work on Australian business hours. 



We need someone who is both strategic and hands-on — someone who understands what makes an ad convert, can research winning angles in the market, and can turn ideas into strong creative quickly.





What you’ll be doing:



Creating high-converting static ads and video ads for Meta and TikTok



Editing short-form video content, including reels and ad creatives



Researching competitor brands, ads, hooks, angles, and content trends



Coming up with fresh creative concepts, ad angles, and testing ideas



Using AI tools to help improve creative output and workflow



Working with AI video platforms such as Higgsfield and similar tools



Helping us develop visually strong ad creatives, on-brand, and performance-focused





What we’re looking for:



Proven experience is a MUST in creating ad creatives for e-commerce, health, wellness, beauty, or supplement brands



Strong skills in graphic design and short-form video editing



Experience making both static image ads and video ads that are built to convert



Strong creative instincts and understanding of what works on Meta and TikTok



Ability to research competitors and find winning ad angles and trends



Highly creative, organised, and proactive



Comfortable using AI tools to speed up production and improve performance



Experience with tools/platforms like Higgsfield is a strong plus





Requirements:



Experience is a must. This is an EXPERT role. Please do not apply if you dont have any experience or you are intermediate to beginner. 



Must be able to show previous work / portfolio and brands you have worked with



References will be required



Must understand direct-response style creative, hooks, and conversion-focused content



We are looking for someone who understands how to make content that not only looks good, but sells.





To apply, please send:



A short intro about yourself



Examples of ads / creatives you’ve made



What brands or industries you’ve worked with



What AI tools you currently use



Your rates and availability



References

title: Enlighs Discord Virtual Assistance (Repost Messages)
description:
Your job is to send other people links on items that can be bought low, and resold for higher, so they can make a profit from reselling them.



You will be getting those links in one 
 server, and we need you to repost the link to another 
 server, with added retail price, resale prices, context.



The main quality we look for is your ability to accurately obtain and estimate item's resale, by using ebay and mercari sold listings. 



Repost messages from one 
 server to another. Around 10-60 messages per day that is around 1-6 sentences.

You need to be able to understand English well, you can not sound like a robot.

Ex) Don't say "Ako ay 25 taong gulang."

Say "Ako ay dalawampu't limang taong gulang."



You need to be on time and repost within 0-2 mins. 

Last person got fired because of unpunctuality. 

If you are late consistently you will be fired, because your job is to help other people buy items from your links, if you are late, the product will sell out, and they won't be able to buy it and resell it for a profit.



We have more opportunities in the field available which can earn you up to 35k peso, with basically no additional work. 

You will need to be native speaker English level, in writing. 



If you are mass applying without even looking, do not apply for this job, because we will send follow up messages asking you to read and perform tasks, and if you don't do the example, you will not get a text back.

title: Virtual Assistant – Dental Accounts Receivable (AR) Specialist
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who can start immediately with minimal to no training or handholding. .

to support our California based dental offices with Accounts Receivable (AR) and patient collections. Only candidates with prior relevant experience should apply



This role focuses on reviewing outstanding balances, communicating with patients, and ensuring timely collections while maintaining a professional and empathetic approach.



Key Responsibilities

Review and break down patient accounts to identify outstanding balances

Analyze AR reports and prioritize accounts for follow-up



Call patients to:

Explain balances clearly

Answer basic billing questions

Collect payments over the phone

Document all calls, notes, and payment activity accurately



Follow structured workflows for:

Past-due balances

Payment plans

Patient vs. insurance responsibility

Escalate complex issues to the internal team when needed



What Success Looks Like

Consistent daily patient outreach

Increased collections and reduced AR aging (60+ / 90+)

Clear, confident, and professional communication

Accurate tracking and follow-through



Requirements

Experience in:

Dental AR / billing (preferred)

Medical billing or collections (acceptable alternative)



Understanding of:

Patient balances and insurance portions

Basic AR aging reports

Strong spoken English and phone confidence

Ability to handle payment conversations professionally

High attention to detail and organization



Preferred (Bonus Skills)

Experience with Dentrix, Eaglesoft, or Open Dental

Familiarity with U.S. dental insurance

Experience working remotely with dental teams
